578→    @Suppress("ComplexMethod", "LongMethod")
579→    fun handleNavigationAction(action: SiteNavigationAction) = when (action) {
580→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMeScreen -> ActivityLauncher.viewMeActivityForResult(activity)
581→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSitePicker -> ActivityLauncher.showSitePickerForResult(activity, action.site)
582→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSite -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentSite(activity, action.site, true)
583→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMediaPicker ->
584→            mediaPickerLauncher.showSiteIconPicker(this@MySiteFragment, action.site)
585→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenCropActivity -> startCropActivity(action.imageUri)
586→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenActivityLog -> ActivityLauncher.viewActivityLogList(activity, action.site)
587→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenBackup -> ActivityLauncher.viewBackupList(activity, action.site)
588→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenScan -> ActivityLauncher.viewScan(activity, action.site)
589→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlan -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogPlans(activity, action.site)
590→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPosts -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPosts(requireActivity(), action.site)
591→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPages -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPages(requireActivity(), action.site)
592→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenHomepage -> ActivityLauncher.editLandingPageForResult(
593→            this,
594→            action.site,
595→            action.homepageLocalId,
596→            action.isNewSite
597→        )
598→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenAdmin -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogAdmin(activity, action.site)
599→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPeople -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPeople(activity, action.site)
600→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSharing -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogSharing(activity, action.site)
601→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenSiteSettings -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogSettingsForResult(activity, action.site)
602→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenThemes -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogThemes(activity, action.site)
603→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPlugins -> ActivityLauncher.viewPluginBrowser(activity, action.site)
604→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMedia -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogMedia(activity, action.site)
605→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenMore -> activityNavigator.openUnifiedMySiteMenu(
606→            requireActivity(),
607→            action.quickStartEvent
608→        )
609→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenUnifiedComments -> ActivityLauncher.viewUnifiedComments(activity, action.site)
610→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenStats -> ActivityLauncher.viewBlogStats(activity, action.site)
611→        is SiteNavigationAction.ConnectJetpackForStats ->
612→            ActivityLauncher.viewConnectJetpackForStats(activity, action.site)
613→        is SiteNavigationAction.StartWPComLoginForJetpackStats ->
614→            ActivityLauncher.loginForJetpackStats(this@MySiteFragment)
615→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenStories -> ActivityLauncher.viewStories(activity, action.site, action.event)
616→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStory ->
617→            ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryForResult(activity, action.site, action.source)
618→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStoryWithMediaIds -> ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryWithMediaIdsForResult(
619→            activity,
620→            action.site,
621→            action.source,
622→            action.mediaIds.toLongArray()
623→        )
624→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewStoryWithMediaUris -> ActivityLauncher.addNewStoryWithMediaUrisForResult(
625→            activity,
626→            action.site,
627→            action.source,
628→            action.mediaUris.toTypedArray()
629→        )
630→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDomains -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainsDashboardActivity(
631→            activity,
632→            action.site
633→        )
634→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDomainRegistration -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainRegistrationActivityForResult(
635→            activity,
636→            action.site,
637→            DomainRegistrationActivity.DomainRegistrationPurpose.CTA_DOMAIN_CREDIT_REDEMPTION
638→        )
639→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenFreeDomainSearch ->
640→            ActivityLauncher.viewPlanWithFreeDomainRegistrationActivityForResult(
641→                this,
642→                action.site,
643→                DomainRegistrationActivity.DomainRegistrationPurpose.FREE_DOMAIN_WITH_ANNUAL_PLAN
644→            )
645→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPaidDomainSearch -> ActivityLauncher.viewDomainRegistrationActivityForResult(
646→            this,
647→            action.site,
648→            DomainRegistrationActivity.DomainRegistrationPurpose.DOMAIN_PURCHASE
649→        )
650→
651→        is SiteNavigationAction.AddNewSite -> SitePickerActivity.addSite(activity, action.hasAccessToken, action.source)
652→        is SiteNavigationAction.ShowQuickStartDialog -> showQuickStartDialog(
653→            action.title,
654→            action.message,
655→            action.positiveButtonLabel,
656→            action.negativeButtonLabel,
657→            action.isNewSite
658→        )
659→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenQuickStartFullScreenDialog -> openQuickStartFullScreenDialog(action)
660→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDraftsPosts ->
661→            ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPostsOfType(requireActivity(), action.site, PostListType.DRAFTS)
662→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenScheduledPosts ->
663→            ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPostsOfType(requireActivity(), action.site, PostListType.SCHEDULED)
664→        // The below navigation is temporary and as such not utilizing the 'action.postId' in order to navigate to the
665→        // 'Edit Post' screen. Instead, it fallbacks to navigating to the 'Posts' screen and targeting a specific tab.
666→        is SiteNavigationAction.EditDraftPost ->
667→            ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPostsOfType(requireActivity(), action.site, PostListType.DRAFTS)
668→        is SiteNavigationAction.EditScheduledPost ->
669→            ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPostsOfType(requireActivity(), action.site, PostListType.SCHEDULED)
670→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenStatsInsights ->
671→            ActivityLauncher.viewBlogStatsForTimeframe(requireActivity(), action.site, StatsTimeframe.INSIGHTS)
672→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenExternalUrl ->
673→            ActivityLauncher.openUrlExternal(requireActivity(), action.url)
674→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenUrlInWebView ->
675→            WPWebViewActivity.openURL(requireActivity(), action.url)
676→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDeepLink ->
677→            DeepLinkingIntentReceiverActivity.openDeepLinkUrl(requireActivity(), action.url)
678→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenJetpackPoweredBottomSheet -> showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet()
679→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenJetpackMigrationDeleteWP -> showJetpackMigrationDeleteWP()
680→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenJetpackFeatureOverlay -> showJetpackFeatureOverlay(action.source)
681→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPromoteWithBlazeOverlay -> activityNavigator.openPromoteWithBlaze(
682→            requireActivity(),
683→            action.source,
684→            action.shouldShowBlazeOverlay
685→        )
686→        is SiteNavigationAction.ShowJetpackRemovalStaticPostersView -> {
687→            ActivityLauncher.showJetpackStaticPoster(requireActivity())
688→        }
689→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenActivityLogDetail -> ActivityLauncher.viewActivityLogDetailFromDashboardCard(
690→            activity,
691→            action.site,
692→            action.activityId,
693→            action.isRewindable
694→        )
695→        is SiteNavigationAction.TriggerCreatePageFlow -> wpMainActivityViewModel.triggerCreatePageFlow()
696→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPagesDraftsTab -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPagesOfType(
697→            requireActivity(),
698→            action.site,
699→            PageListViewModel.PageListType.DRAFTS
700→        )
701→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenPagesScheduledTab -> ActivityLauncher.viewCurrentBlogPagesOfType(
702→            requireActivity(),
703→            action.site,
704→            PageListViewModel.PageListType.SCHEDULED
705→        )
706→
707→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenCampaignListingPage -> activityNavigator.navigateToCampaignListingPage(
708→            requireActivity(),
709→            action.campaignListingPageSource
710→        )
711→
712→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenCampaignDetailPage -> activityNavigator.navigateToCampaignDetailPage(
713→            requireActivity(),
714→            action.campaignId,
715→            action.campaignDetailPageSource
716→        )
717→
718→        is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction -> handleNavigation(action)
719→
720→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenDashboardPersonalization -> activityNavigator.openDashboardPersonalization(
721→            requireActivity()
722→        )
723→
724→        is SiteNavigationAction.OpenBloganuaryNudgeOverlay -> {
725→            BloganuaryNudgeLearnMoreOverlayFragment
726→                .newInstance(action.isPromptsEnabled)
727→                .show(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager, BloganuaryNudgeLearnMoreOverlayFragment.TAG)
728→        }
729→    }
730→
731→    private fun handleNavigation(action: BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction) {
732→        when (action) {
733→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.SharePrompt -> shareMessage(action.message)
734→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.AnswerPrompt -> {
735→                ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(
736→                    activity,
737→                    action.selectedSite,
738→                    false,
739→                    PagePostCreationSourcesDetail.POST_FROM_MY_SITE,
740→                    action.promptId,
741→                    PostUtils.EntryPoint.MY_SITE_CARD_ANSWER_PROMPT
742→                )
743→            }
744→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewAnswers -> {
745→                ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderTagPreview(
746→                    activity,
747→                    action.readerTag,
748→                    ReaderTracker.SOURCE_BLOGGING_PROMPTS_VIEW_ANSWERS,
749→                    readerTracker,
750→                )
751→            }
752→            BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.LearnMore ->
753→                (activity as? BloggingPromptsOnboardingListener)?.onShowBloggingPromptsOnboarding()
754→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.CardRemoved ->
755→                showBloggingPromptCardRemoveConfirmation(action.undoClick)
756→            BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewMore ->
757→                ActivityLauncher.showBloggingPromptsListActivity(activity)
758→        }
759→    }
760→
761→    private fun showBloggingPromptCardRemoveConfirmation(undoClick: () -> Unit) {
762→        context?.run {
763→            val title = getString(R.string.my_site_blogging_prompt_card_removed_snackbar_title)
764→            val subtitle = HtmlCompat.fromHtml(
765→                getString(R.string.my_site_blogging_prompt_card_removed_snackbar_subtitle),
766→                HtmlCompat.FROM_HTML_MODE_COMPACT
767→            )
768→            val message = TitleSubtitleSnackbarSpannable.create(this, title, subtitle)
769→
770→            val snackbarContent = SnackbarMessageHolder(
771→                message = UiString.UiStringText(message),
772→                buttonTitle = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.undo),
773→                buttonAction = { undoClick() },
774→                isImportant = true
775→            )
776→            showSnackbar(snackbarContent)
777→        }
778→    }
779→
780→    private fun showJetpackPoweredBottomSheet() {
781→        JetpackPoweredBottomSheetFragment
782→            .newInstance()
783→            .show(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager, JetpackPoweredBottomSheetFragment.TAG)
784→    }
785→
786→    private fun showJetpackMigrationDeleteWP() {
787→        val intent = JetpackMigrationActivity.createIntent(
788→            context = requireActivity(),
789→            showDeleteWpState = true
790→        )
791→        startActivity(intent)
792→    }
793→
794→    private fun showJetpackFeatureOverlay(
795→        source: JetpackFeatureRemovalOverlayUtil.JetpackFeatureCollectionOverlaySource
796→    ) {
797→        JetpackFeatureFullScreenOverlayFragment
798→            .newInstance(
799→                isFeatureCollectionOverlay = true,
800→                featureCollectionOverlaySource = source
801→            )
802→            .show(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager, JetpackFeatureFullScreenOverlayFragment.TAG)
803→    }
804→
805→    private fun openQuickStartFullScreenDialog(action: SiteNavigationAction.OpenQuickStartFullScreenDialog) {
806→        val bundle = QuickStartFullScreenDialogFragment.newBundle(action.type)
807→        FullScreenDialogFragment.Builder(requireContext())
808→            .setOnConfirmListener(this)
809→            .setOnDismissListener(this)
810→            .setContent(QuickStartFullScreenDialogFragment::class.java, bundle)
811→            .build()
812→            .show(requireActivity().supportFragmentManager, FullScreenDialogFragment.TAG)
813→    }
814→
815→    private fun startCropActivity(imageUri: UriWrapper) {
816→        val context = activity ?: return
817→        val options = UCrop.Options()
818→        options.setShowCropGrid(false)
819→        options.setStatusBarColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(android.R.attr.statusBarColor))
820→        options.setToolbarColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(R.attr.wpColorAppBar))
821→        options.setToolbarWidgetColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorOnSurface))
822→        options.setAllowedGestures(UCropActivity.SCALE, UCropActivity.NONE, UCropActivity.NONE)
823→        options.setHideBottomControls(true)
824→        UCrop.of(imageUri.uri, Uri.fromFile(File(context.cacheDir, "cropped_for_site_icon.jpg")))
825→            .withAspectRatio(1f, 1f)
826→            .withOptions(options)
827→            .start(requireActivity(), this)
828→    }
829→
830→    private fun showQuickStartDialog(
831→        @StringRes title: Int,
832→        @StringRes message: Int,
833→        @StringRes positiveButtonLabel: Int,
834→        @StringRes negativeButtonLabel: Int,
835→        isNewSite: Boolean
836→    ) {
837→        val tag = TAG_QUICK_START_DIALOG
838→        val quickStartPromptDialogFragment = QuickStartPromptDialogFragment()
839→        quickStartPromptDialogFragment.initialize(
840→            tag,
841→            getString(title),
842→            getString(message),
843→            getString(positiveButtonLabel),
844→            R.drawable.img_illustration_site_about_280dp,
845→            getString(negativeButtonLabel),
846→            isNewSite
847→        )
848→        quickStartPromptDialogFragment.show(parentFragmentManager, tag)
849→        quickStartTracker.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.QUICK_START_REQUEST_VIEWED)
850→    }
851→
852→    companion object {
853→        @JvmField
854→        var TAG: String = MySiteFragment::class.java.simpleName
855→        private const val CHECK_REFRESH_DELAY = 300L
856→        private const val KEY_LIST_STATE = "key_list_state"
857→        private const val KEY_NESTED_LISTS_STATES = "key_nested_lists_states"
858→        private const val TAG_QUICK_START_DIALOG = "TAG_QUICK_START_DIALOG"
859→        private const val FIRST_ITEM = 0
860→        fun newInstance(): MySiteFragment {
861→            return MySiteFragment()
862→        }
863→    }
864→}

 259→    val state: LiveData<MySiteUiState> =
 260→        selectedSiteRepository.siteSelected.switchMap { siteLocalId ->
 261→            isSiteSelected = true
 262→            quickLinksItemViewModelSlice.onSiteChanged()
 263→            resetShownTrackers()
 264→            val result = MediatorLiveData<SiteIdToState>()
 265→            for (newSource in mySiteSourceManager.build(viewModelScope, siteLocalId)) {
 266→                result.addSource(newSource) { partialState ->
 267→                    if (partialState != null) {
 268→                        result.value = (result.value ?: SiteIdToState(siteLocalId)).update(partialState)
 269→                    }
 270→                }
 271→            }
 272→            // We want to filter out the empty state where we have a site ID but site object is missing.
 273→            // Without this check there is an emission of a NoSites state even if we have the site
 274→            result.filter { it.siteId == null || it.state.site != null }.mapSafe { it.state }
 275→        }
 276→
 277→    val uiModel: LiveData<State> = merge(state, quickLinks) { cards, quickLinks ->
 278→        val nonNullCards = cards ?: return@merge buildNoSiteState(null, null)
 279→        with(nonNullCards) {
 280→            val state = if (site != null) {
 281→                cardsUpdate?.checkAndShowSnackbarError()
 282→                val state = buildSiteSelectedStateAndScroll(
 283→                    site,
 284→                    showSiteIconProgressBar,
 285→                    activeTask,
 286→                    isDomainCreditAvailable,
 287→                    quickStartCategories,
 288→                    backupAvailable,
 289→                    scanAvailable,
 290→                    cardsUpdate,
 291→                    bloggingPromptsUpdate,
 292→                    blazeCardUpdate,
 293→                    quickLinks
 294→                )
 295→                trackCardsAndItemsShownIfNeeded(state)
 296→
 297→                bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.onDashboardCardsUpdated(
 298→                    viewModelScope,
 299→                    state as? SiteSelected
 300→                )
 301→                state
 302→            } else {
 303→                buildNoSiteState(currentAvatarUrl, avatarName)
 304→            }
 305→            bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.onSiteChanged(site?.id, state as? SiteSelected)
 306→
 307→            dashboardCardPlansUtils.onSiteChanged(site?.id, state as? SiteSelected)
 308→
 309→            state
 310→        }
 311→    }

 383→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "CyclomaticComplexMethod")
 384→    private fun buildSiteSelectedState(
 385→        site: SiteModel,
 386→        activeTask: QuickStartTask?,
 387→        isDomainCreditAvailable: Boolean,
 388→        quickStartCategories: List<QuickStartCategory>,

 408→    private fun buildSiteItemsMenu(
 409→        site: SiteModel,

 414→    ): List<MySiteCardAndItem> {
 415→        val infoItem = mySiteInfoItemBuilder.build(
 416→            InfoItemBuilderParams(
 417→                isStaleMessagePresent = cardsUpdate?.showStaleMessage ?: false
 418→            )
 419→        )
 420→        val jetpackFeatureCard = getJetpackFeatureCard()
 421→
 422→        val jetpackSwitchMenu = getJetpackSwitchMenu()
 423→
 424→        val jetpackBadge = buildJetpackBadgeIfEnabled()
 425→
 426→        val siteItems = getSiteItems(site, activeTask, backupAvailable, scanAvailable)
 427→
 428→        val sotw2023Card = sotw2023NudgeCardViewModelSlice.buildCard()
 429→
 430→        return mutableListOf<MySiteCardAndItem>().apply {
 431→            infoItem?.let { add(infoItem) }
 432→            sotw2023Card?.let { add(it) }
 433→            addAll(siteItems)
 434→            jetpackSwitchMenu?.let { add(jetpackSwitchMenu) }
 435→            if (jetpackFeatureCardHelper.shouldShowFeatureCardAtTop())
 436→                jetpackFeatureCard?.let { add(0, jetpackFeatureCard) }
 437→            else jetpackFeatureCard?.let { add(jetpackFeatureCard) }

 442→    private fun buildDashboardCards(

 459→        val jetpackInstallFullPluginCardParams = JetpackInstallFullPluginCardBuilderParams(
 460→            site = site,

 462→            onHideMenuItemClick = ::onJetpackInstallFullPluginHideMenuItemClick,
 463→        )
 464→        val jetpackInstallFullPluginCard = jetpackInstallFullPluginCardBuilder.build(jetpackInstallFullPluginCardParams)
 465→
 466→        val cardsResult = cardsBuilder.build(
 467→            DomainRegistrationCardBuilderParams(
 468→                isDomainCreditAvailable = isDomainCreditAvailable,
 469→                domainRegistrationClick = this::domainRegistrationClick
 470→            ),
 471→            QuickStartCardBuilderParams(
 472→                quickStartCategories = quickStartCategories,
 473→                moreMenuClickParams = QuickStartCardBuilderParams.MoreMenuParams(
 474→                    onMoreMenuClick = this::onQuickStartMoreMenuClick,
 475→                    onHideThisMenuItemClick = this::onQuickStartHideThisMenuItemClick
 476→                ),
 477→                onQuickStartTaskTypeItemClick = this::onQuickStartTaskTypeItemClick
 478→            ),
 479→            DashboardCardsBuilderParams(
 480→                showErrorCard = cardsUpdate?.showErrorCard == true,
 481→                onErrorRetryClick = this::onDashboardErrorRetry,
 482→                todaysStatsCardBuilderParams = todaysStatsViewModelSlice.getTodaysStatsBuilderParams(
 483→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is TodaysStatsCardModel } as? TodaysStatsCardModel
 484→                ),
 485→                postCardBuilderParams = postsCardViewModelSlice.getPostsCardBuilderParams(
 486→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is PostsCardModel } as? PostsCardModel
 487→                ),
 488→                bloganuaryNudgeCardBuilderParams = bloganuaryNudgeCardViewModelSlice.getBuilderParams(),
 489→                bloggingPromptCardBuilderParams = bloggingPromptCardViewModelSlice.getBuilderParams(
 490→                    bloggingPromptUpdate
 491→                ),
 492→                blazeCardBuilderParams = blazeCardViewModelSlice.getBlazeCardBuilderParams(blazeCardUpdate),
 493→                dashboardCardPlansBuilderParams = DashboardCardPlansBuilderParams(
 494→                    isEligible = dashboardCardPlansUtils.shouldShowCard(site),
 495→                    onClick = this::onDashboardCardPlansClick,
 496→                    onHideMenuItemClick = this::onDashboardCardPlansHideMenuItemClick,
 497→                    onMoreMenuClick = this::onDashboardCardPlansMoreMenuClick
 498→                ),
 499→                pagesCardBuilderParams = pagesCardViewModelSlice.getPagesCardBuilderParams(
 500→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is PagesCardModel } as? PagesCardModel,
 501→                ),
 502→                activityCardBuilderParams = activityLogCardViewModelSlice.getActivityLogCardBuilderParams(
 503→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is ActivityCardModel } as? ActivityCardModel
 504→                ),
 505→                dynamicCardsBuilderParams = dynamicCardsViewModelSlice.getBuilderParams(
 506→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is DynamicCardsModel } as? DynamicCardsModel
 507→                )
 508→            ),
 509→            jetpackInstallFullPluginCardParams
 510→        )
 511→
 512→        val personalizeCard = personalizeCardBuilder.build(personalizeCardViewModelSlice.getBuilderParams())
 513→
 514→        val noCardsMessage = noCardsMessageViewModelSlice.buildNoCardsMessage(cardsResult)
 515→
 516→        return mutableListOf<MySiteCardAndItem>().apply {
 517→            infoItem?.let { add(infoItem) }
 518→            migrationSuccessCard?.let { add(migrationSuccessCard) }
 519→            jetpackInstallFullPluginCard?.let { add(jetpackInstallFullPluginCard) }
 520→            quickLinks?.let { add(quickLinks) }
 521→            addAll(cardsResult)
 522→            noCardsMessage?.let { add(noCardsMessage) }
 523→            personalizeCard?.let { add(personalizeCard) }
 524→        }.toList()
 525→    }

 624→    private fun scrollToQuickStartTaskIfNecessary(
 625→        quickStartTask: QuickStartTask,
 626→        position: Int
 627→    ) {
 628→        if (_activeTaskPosition.value?.first != quickStartTask && isValidQuickStartFocusPosition(
 629→                quickStartTask,
 630→                position
 631→            )
 632→        ) {
 633→            _activeTaskPosition.postValue(quickStartTask to position)
 634→        }

 637→    private fun isValidQuickStartFocusPosition(quickStartTask: QuickStartTask, position: Int): Boolean {
 638→        return if (position == LIST_INDEX_NO_ACTIVE_QUICK_START_ITEM && isSiteHeaderQuickStartTask(quickStartTask)) {
 639→            true
 640→        } else {
 641→            position >= 0
 642→        }
 643→    }
 644→
 645→    private fun isSiteHeaderQuickStartTask(quickStartTask: QuickStartTask): Boolean {
 646→        return when (quickStartTask) {
 647→            QuickStartNewSiteTask.UPDATE_SITE_TITLE,
 648→            QuickStartNewSiteTask.UPLOAD_SITE_ICON,
 649→            quickStartRepository.quickStartType.getTaskFromString(QUICK_START_VIEW_SITE_LABEL) -> true
 650→
 651→            else -> false
 652→        }
 653→    }

 977→    private fun trackCardsAndItemsShownIfNeeded(siteSelected: SiteSelected) {
 978→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<DomainRegistrationCard>()
 979→            .forEach { domainRegistrationCardShownTracker.trackShown(it.type) }
 980→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<MySiteCardAndItem.Card>()
 981→            .let { cardsTracker.trackShown(it) }
 982→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<QuickStartCard>()
 983→            .firstOrNull()?.let { quickStartTracker.trackShown(it.type) }
 984→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<QuickStartCard>()
 985→            .firstOrNull()?.let { cardsTracker.trackQuickStartCardShown(quickStartRepository.quickStartType) }
 986→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<JetpackFeatureCard>()
 987→            .forEach { jetpackFeatureCardShownTracker.trackShown(it.type) }
 988→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<JetpackInstallFullPluginCard>()
 989→            .forEach { jetpackInstallFullPluginShownTracker.trackShown(it.type) }
 990→        dashboardCardPlansUtils.trackCardShown(viewModelScope, siteSelected)
 991→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<MySiteCardAndItem.Card.PersonalizeCardModel>()
 992→            .forEach { personalizeCardViewModelSlice.trackShown(it.type) }
 993→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<MySiteCardAndItem.Card.NoCardsMessage>()
 994→            .forEach { noCardsMessageViewModelSlice.trackShown(it.type) }
 995→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<MySiteCardAndItem.Card.WpSotw2023NudgeCardModel>()
 996→            .forEach { _ -> sotw2023NudgeCardViewModelSlice.trackShown() }
 997→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<MySiteCardAndItem.Card.Dynamic>()
 998→            .forEach { dynamicCardsViewModelSlice.trackShown(it.id) }
 999→    }

conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.usecase.social
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
 5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.FetchedJetpackSocialResult
 6→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.doesNotContain
 7→import javax.inject.Inject
 8→
 9→class GetJetpackSocialShareLimitStatusUseCase @Inject constructor(
10→    private val siteStore: SiteStore,
11→) {
12→    suspend fun execute(siteModel: SiteModel): ShareLimit {
13→        val isShareLimitEnabled =
14→            !siteModel.isHostedAtWPCom
15→                    && (siteModel.planActiveFeatures?.split(",")?.doesNotContain(FEATURE_SOCIAL_SHARES_1000) != false)
16→        val result = siteStore.fetchJetpackSocial(siteModel)
17→        return if (isShareLimitEnabled && result is FetchedJetpackSocialResult.Success) {
18→            with(result.jetpackSocial) {
19→                ShareLimit.Enabled(
20→                    shareLimit = shareLimit,
21→                    publicizedCount = publicizedCount,
22→                    sharedPostsCount = sharedPostsCount,
23→                    sharesRemaining = sharesRemaining,
24→                )
25→            }
26→        } else {
27→            ShareLimit.Disabled
28→        }
29→    }
30→}
31→
32→sealed interface ShareLimit {
33→    data class Enabled(
34→        val shareLimit: Int,
35→        val publicizedCount: Int,
36→        val sharedPostsCount: Int,
37→        val sharesRemaining: Int,
38→    ) : ShareLimit
39→
40→    object Disabled : ShareLimit
41→}
42→
43→private const val FEATURE_SOCIAL_SHARES_1000 = "social-shares-1000"
44→

13→
14→class TodaysStatsViewModelSlice @Inject constructor(
15→    private val cardsTracker: CardsTracker,
16→    private val selectedSiteRepository: SelectedSiteRepository,
17→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper,
18→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper
19→) {
20→    private val _onNavigation = MutableLiveData<Event<SiteNavigationAction>>()
21→    val onNavigation = _onNavigation
22→
23→    private val _refresh = MutableLiveData<Event<Boolean>>()
24→    val refresh = _refresh
25→
26→    fun getTodaysStatsBuilderParams(todaysStatsCardModel: TodaysStatsCardModel?): TodaysStatsCardBuilderParams {
27→        return TodaysStatsCardBuilderParams(
28→            todaysStatsCard = todaysStatsCardModel,
29→            onTodaysStatsCardClick = this::onTodaysStatsCardClick,
30→            onGetMoreViewsClick = this::onGetMoreViewsClick,
31→            moreMenuClickParams = TodaysStatsCardBuilderParams.MoreMenuParams(
32→                onMoreMenuClick = this::onMoreMenuClick,
33→                onHideThisMenuItemClick = this::onHideThisMenuItemClick,
34→                onViewStatsMenuItemClick = this::onViewStatsMenuItemClick
35→            )
36→        )
37→    }
38→
39→    private fun onTodaysStatsCardClick() {
40→        cardsTracker.trackCardItemClicked(CardsTracker.Type.STATS.label, CardsTracker.StatsSubtype.TODAYS_STATS.label)
41→        navigateToTodaysStats()
42→    }
43→
44→    private fun onGetMoreViewsClick() {
45→        cardsTracker.trackCardItemClicked(
46→            CardsTracker.Type.STATS.label,
47→            CardsTracker.StatsSubtype.TODAYS_STATS_NUDGE.label
48→        )
49→        if (jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowStaticPage()) {
50→            _onNavigation.value = Event(SiteNavigationAction.ShowJetpackRemovalStaticPostersView)
51→        } else {
52→            _onNavigation.value = Event(
53→                SiteNavigationAction.OpenExternalUrl(
54→                    TodaysStatsCardBuilder.URL_GET_MORE_VIEWS_AND_TRAFFIC
55→                )
56→            )
57→        }
58→    }
59→
60→    private fun onMoreMenuClick() {
61→        cardsTracker.trackCardMoreMenuClicked(CardsTracker.Type.STATS.label)
62→    }
63→
64→    private fun onHideThisMenuItemClick() {
65→        cardsTracker.trackCardMoreMenuItemClicked(
66→            CardsTracker.Type.STATS.label,
67→            TodaysStatsMenuItemType.HIDE_THIS.label
68→        )
69→        appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHideTodaysStatsDashboardCard(selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()!!.siteId, true)
70→        _refresh.postValue(Event(true))
71→    }
72→
73→    private fun onViewStatsMenuItemClick() {
74→        cardsTracker.trackCardMoreMenuItemClicked(
75→            CardsTracker.Type.STATS.label,
76→            TodaysStatsMenuItemType.VIEW_STATS.label
77→        )
78→        navigateToTodaysStats()
79→    }
80→
81→    private fun navigateToTodaysStats() {
82→        val selectedSite = requireNotNull(selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite())
83→        if (jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowStaticPage()) {
84→            _onNavigation.value = Event(SiteNavigationAction.ShowJetpackRemovalStaticPostersView)
85→        } else {
86→            _onNavigation.value = Event(SiteNavigationAction.OpenStatsInsights(selectedSite))
87→        }
88→    }
89→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.util.extensions
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.persistence.JetpackCPConnectedSiteModel
 5→
 6→/**
 7→ * @return a List of the active individual Jetpack plugins names
 8→ * (e.g. [Jetpack Search, Jetpack VaultPress Backup]) or null if there are no active Jetpack connection plugins.
 9→ */
10→fun SiteModel.activeIndividualJetpackPluginNames(): List<String>? =
11→    activeJetpackConnectionPluginValues()?.filterMapJetpackIndividualPluginValuesToNames()
12→
13→/**
14→ * @return a List of the active individual Jetpack plugins names
15→ * (e.g. [Jetpack Search, Jetpack VaultPress Backup]) or null if there are no active Jetpack connection plugins.
16→ */
17→fun JetpackCPConnectedSiteModel.activeIndividualJetpackPluginNames(): List<String> =
18→    activeJetpackConnectionPlugins.filterMapJetpackIndividualPluginValuesToNames()
19→
20→/**
21→ * @return true if the site has active Jetpack individual plugins connected and does not have the full Jetpack plugin
22→ */
23→fun SiteModel.isJetpackIndividualPluginConnectedWithoutFullPlugin(): Boolean =
24→    activeJetpackConnectionPluginValues()?.run {
25→        isNotEmpty() && none { it.isJetpackFullPlugin() } && any { it.isJetpackIndividualPlugin() }
26→    } ?: false
27→
28→/**
29→ * @return true if the site has active Jetpack individual plugins connected and does not have the full Jetpack plugin
30→ */
31→fun JetpackCPConnectedSiteModel.isJetpackIndividualPluginConnectedWithoutFullPlugin(): Boolean =
32→    activeJetpackConnectionPlugins.run {
33→        isNotEmpty() && none { it.isJetpackFullPlugin() } && any { it.isJetpackIndividualPlugin() }
34→    }
35→
36→private fun List<String>.filterMapJetpackIndividualPluginValuesToNames(): List<String> = this
37→    .filter { it.isJetpackIndividualPlugin() }
38→    .mapNotNull {
39→        when (it) {
40→            "jetpack-search" -> "Jetpack Search"
41→            "jetpack-backup" -> "Jetpack VaultPress Backup"
42→            "jetpack-protect" -> "Jetpack Protect"
43→            "jetpack-videopress" -> "Jetpack VideoPress"
44→            "jetpack-social" -> "Jetpack Social"
45→            "jetpack-boost" -> "Jetpack Boost"
46→            else -> null
47→        }
48→    }
49→
50→private fun String.isJetpackIndividualPlugin(): Boolean = this.startsWith("jetpack-")
51→
52→private fun String.isJetpackFullPlugin(): Boolean = this == "jetpack"

 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.R

 5→import org.wordpress.android.models.PublicizeService

 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.EditorJetpackSocialViewModel.JetpackSocialUiState.NoConnections
 9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.social.PostSocialConnection
10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.social.compose.PostSocialSharingModel

12→import org.wordpress.android.usecase.social.JetpackSocialFlow

17→
18→class EditPostPublishSettingsJetpackSocialUiStateMapper @Inject constructor(
19→    private val stringProvider: StringProvider,
20→    private val localeProvider: LocaleProvider,
21→    private val publicizeTableWrapper: PublicizeTableWrapper,
22→) {
23→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
24→    fun mapLoaded(
25→        connections: List<PostSocialConnection>,
26→        shareLimit: ShareLimit,
27→        socialSharingModel: PostSocialSharingModel,
28→        onSubscribeClick: (JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
29→        shareMessage: String,
30→        onShareMessageClick: () -> Unit,
31→        onConnectionClick: (PostSocialConnection, Boolean, JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
32→        isPostPublished: Boolean,
33→    ): Loaded {
34→        val selectedConnectionsSize = connections.filter { it.isSharingEnabled }.size
35→        return Loaded(
36→            jetpackSocialConnectionDataList = connections.map { connection ->
37→                JetpackSocialConnectionData(
38→                    postSocialConnection = connection,
39→                    onConnectionClick = { newValue, flow -> onConnectionClick(connection, newValue, flow) },
40→                    enabled = !isPostPublished && if (shareLimit is ShareLimit.Enabled) {
41→                        if (!connection.isSharingEnabled) {
42→                            shareLimit.sharesRemaining > selectedConnectionsSize
43→                        } else shareLimit.sharesRemaining > 0
44→                    } else true
45→                )
46→            },
47→            socialSharingModel = socialSharingModel,
48→            showShareLimitUi = !isPostPublished && shareLimit is ShareLimit.Enabled,
49→            isShareMessageEnabled = !isPostPublished,
50→            shareMessage = shareMessage,
51→            onShareMessageClick = onShareMessageClick,
52→            subscribeButtonLabel = stringProvider.getString(R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_subscribe_share_more)
53→                .uppercase(localeProvider.getAppLocale()),
54→            onSubscribeClick = onSubscribeClick,
55→        )
56→    }
57→
58→    fun mapNoConnections(
59→        onConnectProfilesClick: (JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
60→        onNotNowClick: (JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
61→    ): NoConnections =
62→        NoConnections(
63→            trainOfIconsModels = publicizeTableWrapper.getServiceList()
64→                .filter { it.status != PublicizeService.Status.UNSUPPORTED }
65→                .mapNotNull { PublicizeServiceIcon.fromServiceId(it.id) }
66→                .map { TrainOfIconsModel(it.iconResId) },
67→            message = stringProvider.getString(
68→                R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_connect_social_profiles_message
69→            ),
70→            connectProfilesButtonLabel = stringProvider.getString(
71→                R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_connect_social_profiles_button
72→            ),
73→            onConnectProfilesClick = onConnectProfilesClick,
74→            notNowButtonLabel = stringProvider.getString(
75→                R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_connect_not_now_button
76→            ),
77→            onNotNowClick = onNotNowClick,
78→        )
79→}

 37→sealed class PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(
 38→    internal val parent: ViewGroup,
 39→    @LayoutRes layout: Int
 40→) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(LayoutInflater.from(parent.context).inflate(layout, parent, false)) {
 41→    abstract fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState)
 42→
 43→    class PrepublishingHomeListItemViewHolder(parentView: ViewGroup, val uiHelpers: UiHelpers) :
 44→        PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(parentView, R.layout.prepublishing_action_list_item) {
 45→        private val actionType: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.action_type)
 46→        private val actionResult: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.action_result)
 47→        private val actionLayout: View = itemView.findViewById(R.id.action_layout)
 48→
 49→        override fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState) {
 50→            uiState as HomeUiState
 51→
 52→            actionType.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, uiState.navigationAction.textRes)
 53→            uiState.actionResult?.let { resultText ->
 54→                actionResult.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, resultText)
 55→            }
 56→
 57→            actionLayout.isEnabled = uiState.actionClickable
 58→            actionLayout.setOnClickListener {
 59→                uiState.onNavigationActionClicked?.invoke(uiState.navigationAction)
 60→            }
 61→
 62→            actionType.setTextColor(
 63→                ContextCompat.getColor(
 64→                    itemView.context,
 65→                    uiState.actionTypeColor
 66→                )
 67→            )
 68→            actionResult.setTextColor(
 69→                ContextCompat.getColor(
 70→                    itemView.context,
 71→                    uiState.actionResultColor
 72→                )
 73→            )
 74→        }
 75→    }
 76→
 77→    class PrepublishingHeaderListItemViewHolder(
 78→        parentView: ViewGroup,
 79→        val uiHelpers: UiHelpers,
 80→        val imageManager: ImageManager
 81→    ) : PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(parentView, R.layout.prepublishing_home_header_list_item) {
 82→        private val siteName: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.site_name)
 83→        private val siteIcon: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.site_icon)
 84→
 85→        override fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState) {
 86→            uiState as HeaderUiState
 87→
 88→            siteName.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, uiState.siteName)
 89→
 90→            imageManager.load(siteIcon, ImageType.BLAVATAR, uiState.siteIconUrl)
 91→        }
 92→    }
 93→
 94→    class PrepublishingSubmitButtonViewHolder(parentView: ViewGroup, val uiHelpers: UiHelpers) :
 95→        PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(
 96→            parentView,
 97→            R.layout.prepublishing_home_publish_button_list_item
 98→        ) {
 99→        private val button: Button = itemView.findViewById(R.id.publish_button)
100→
101→        override fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState) {
102→            uiState as ButtonUiState
103→
104→            button.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, uiState.buttonText)
105→            button.setOnClickListener {
106→                uiState.onButtonClicked?.invoke(uiState.publishPost)
107→            }
108→        }
109→    }
110→
111→    class PrepublishingSocialItemViewHolder(
112→        parentView: ViewGroup,
113→        val uiHelpers: UiHelpers,
114→    ) : PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(parentView, R.layout.prepublishing_home_compose_item) {
115→        private val composeView: ComposeView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.prepublishing_compose_view)
116→        private val dividerView: View = itemView.findViewById(R.id.bottom_divider)
117→
118→        override fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState) {
119→            require(uiState is SocialUiState) {
120→                "PrepublishingSocialItemViewHolder can only bind SocialUiState"
121→            }
122→
123→            dividerView.isGone = uiState is SocialUiState.Visible &&
124→                    uiState.state is JetpackSocialUiState.NoConnections
125→
126→            composeView.setContent {
127→                val state: SocialUiState by remember(uiState) {
128→                    mutableStateOf(uiState)
129→                }
130→
131→                AppTheme {
132→                    (state as? SocialUiState.Visible)?.let { visibleState ->
133→                        when (val internalState = visibleState.state) {
134→                            is JetpackSocialUiState.Loaded -> {
135→                                PostSocialSharingItem(
136→                                    model = internalState.socialSharingModel,
137→                                    backgroundColor = MaterialTheme.colors.surface.withBottomSheetElevation(),
138→                                    modifier = Modifier
139→                                        .fillMaxWidth()
140→                                        .clickable(
141→                                            interactionSource = remember { MutableInteractionSource() },
142→                                            indication = null, // no ripple
143→                                            onClick = visibleState.onItemClicked,
144→                                        ),
145→                                )
146→                            }
147→
148→                            is JetpackSocialUiState.NoConnections -> {
149→                                PrepublishingHomeSocialNoConnectionsItem(
150→                                    connectionIconModels = internalState.trainOfIconsModels,
151→                                    onConnectClick = {
152→                                        internalState.onConnectProfilesClick(JetpackSocialFlow.PRE_PUBLISHING)
153→                                     },
154→                                    onDismissClick = { internalState.onNotNowClick(JetpackSocialFlow.PRE_PUBLISHING) },
155→                                    backgroundColor = MaterialTheme.colors.surface.withBottomSheetElevation(),
156→                                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
157→                                )
158→                            }
159→
160→                            JetpackSocialUiState.Loading -> {} // do nothing
161→                        }
162→                    }
163→                }
164→            }
165→        }
166→    }
167→}

conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.plans
  2→
  3→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  4→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  5→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
  6→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
  7→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
  8→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker
  9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 10→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItem.Card.DashboardPlansCard
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteViewModel.State.SiteSelected
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.BuildConfigWrapper
 15→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 16→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean
 17→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicReference
 18→import javax.inject.Inject
 19→import javax.inject.Named
 20→
 21→class PlansCardUtils @Inject constructor(
 22→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 23→    private val buildConfigWrapper: BuildConfigWrapper,
 24→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 25→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 26→) {
 27→    private var dashboardUpdateDebounceJob: Job? = null
 28→
 29→    private val plansCardVisible = AtomicReference<Boolean?>(null)
 30→    private val waitingToTrack = AtomicBoolean(false)
 31→    private val currentSite = AtomicReference<Int?>(null)
 32→
 33→    fun shouldShowCard(
 34→        siteModel: SiteModel,
 35→    ): Boolean {
 36→        return buildConfigWrapper.isJetpackApp &&
 37→                !isCardHiddenByUser(siteModel.siteId) &&
 38→                (siteModel.isWPCom || siteModel.isWPComAtomic) &&
 39→                siteModel.hasFreePlan &&
 40→                siteModel.isAdmin &&
 41→                !siteModel.isWpForTeamsSite
 42→    }
 43→
 44→    fun hideCard(siteId: Long) {
 45→        appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHideDashboardPlansCard(siteId, true)
 46→    }
 47→
 48→    fun trackCardShown(scope: CoroutineScope, siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 49→        // cancel any existing job (debouncing mechanism)
 50→        dashboardUpdateDebounceJob?.cancel()
 51→
 52→        dashboardUpdateDebounceJob = scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 53→            val isVisible = siteSelected
 54→                ?.dashboardData
 55→                ?.any { card ->
 56→                    card is DashboardPlansCard
 57→                } ?: false
 58→
 59→            // add a delay (debouncing mechanism)
 60→            delay(CARD_VISIBLE_DEBOUNCE)
 61→
 62→            plansCardVisible.set(isVisible)
 63→            if (isVisible && waitingToTrack.getAndSet(false)) {
 64→                trackCardShown(positionIndex(siteSelected))
 65→            }
 66→        }.also {
 67→            it.invokeOnCompletion { cause ->
 68→                // only set the job to null if it wasn't cancelled since cancellation is part of debouncing
 69→                if (cause == null) dashboardUpdateDebounceJob = null
 70→            }
 71→        }
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    fun onResume(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 75→        onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected)
 76→    }
 77→
 78→    fun onSiteChanged(siteId: Int?, siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 79→        if (currentSite.getAndSet(siteId) != siteId) {
 80→            plansCardVisible.set(null)
 81→            onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected)
 82→        }
 83→    }
 84→
 85→    fun trackCardTapped(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 86→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
 87→            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_TAPPED,
 88→            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
 89→        )
 90→    }
 91→
 92→    fun trackCardMoreMenuTapped(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 93→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
 94→            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_MORE_MENU_TAPPED,
 95→            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
 96→        )
 97→    }
 98→
 99→    fun trackCardHiddenByUser(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
100→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
101→            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_HIDDEN,
102→            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
103→        )
104→    }
105→
106→    private fun trackCardShown(positionIndex: Int) {
107→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
108→            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_SHOWN,
109→            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex)
110→        )
111→    }
112→
113→    private fun isCardHiddenByUser(siteId: Long): Boolean {
114→        return appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHideDashboardPlansCard(siteId)
115→    }
116→
117→    private fun positionIndex(siteSelected: SiteSelected?): Int {
118→        return siteSelected
119→            ?.dashboardData
120→            ?.indexOfFirst {
121→                it is DashboardPlansCard
122→            } ?: -1
123→    }
124→
125→    private fun onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
126→        plansCardVisible.get()?.let { isVisible ->
127→            if (isVisible) trackCardShown(positionIndex(siteSelected))
128→            waitingToTrack.set(false)
129→        } ?: run {
130→            waitingToTrack.set(true)
131→        }
132→    }
133→
134→    companion object {
135→        const val POSITION_INDEX = "position_index"
136→        private const val CARD_VISIBLE_DEBOUNCE = 500L
137→    }
138→}
139→

 36→class SiteListItemBuilder @Inject constructor(
 37→    private val accountStore: AccountStore,
 38→    private val pluginUtilsWrapper: PluginUtilsWrapper,
 39→    private val siteUtilsWrapper: SiteUtilsWrapper,
 40→    private val buildConfigWrapper: BuildConfigWrapper,
 41→    private val themeBrowserUtils: ThemeBrowserUtils,
 42→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper
 43→) {
 44→    fun buildActivityLogItemIfAvailable(site: SiteModel, onClick: (ListItemAction) -> Unit): ListItem? {
 45→        val isWpComOrJetpack = siteUtilsWrapper.isAccessedViaWPComRest(
 46→            site
 47→        ) || site.isJetpackConnected
 48→        return if (site.hasCapabilityManageOptions && isWpComOrJetpack && !site.isWpForTeamsSite) {
 49→            ListItem(
 50→                R.drawable.ic_history_white_24dp,
 51→                UiStringRes(R.string.activity_log),
 52→                onClick = ListItemInteraction.create(ACTIVITY_LOG, onClick),
 53→                listItemAction = ACTIVITY_LOG
 54→            )
 55→        } else null
 56→    }
 57→
 58→    fun buildBackupItemIfAvailable(onClick: (ListItemAction) -> Unit, isBackupAvailable: Boolean = false): ListItem? {
 59→        return if (isBackupAvailable) {
 60→            ListItem(
 61→                R.drawable.ic_gridicons_cloud_upload_white_24dp,
 62→                UiStringRes(R.string.backup),
 63→                onClick = ListItemInteraction.create(BACKUP, onClick),
 64→                listItemAction = BACKUP
 65→            )
 66→        } else null
 67→    }
 68→
 69→    fun buildScanItemIfAvailable(onClick: (ListItemAction) -> Unit, isScanAvailable: Boolean = false): ListItem? {
 70→        return if (isScanAvailable) {
 71→            ListItem(
 72→                R.drawable.ic_baseline_security_white_24dp,
 73→                UiStringRes(R.string.scan),
 74→                onClick = ListItemInteraction.create(SCAN, onClick),
 75→                listItemAction = SCAN
 76→            )
 77→        } else null
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    @Suppress("ComplexCondition")
 81→    fun buildPlanItemIfAvailable(
 82→        site: SiteModel,
 83→        showFocusPoint: Boolean,

content.text:
I have implemented the fix to prevent share limits from being shown for Atomic sites in the context of Jetpack Social.

### Changes Made:

#### 1. Updated `GetJetpackSocialShareLimitStatusUseCase.kt`
I modified the `isShareLimitEnabled` logic in `GetJetpackSocialShareLimitStatusUseCase` to explicitly check if a site is Atomic using the `isWPComAtomic` property of `SiteModel`. Share limits are now disabled if the site is either hosted at WordPress.com (Simple sites) or is an Atomic site.

```kotlin
val isShareLimitEnabled =
    !siteModel.isHostedAtWPCom && !siteModel.isWPComAtomic
            && (siteModel.planActiveFeatures?.split(",")?.doesNotContain(FEATURE_SOCIAL_SHARES_1000) != false)
```

This change addresses all three locations mentioned in the issue:
- **Share limits dashboard card**: By disabling the share limit status for Atomic sites, any card relying on this UseCase or the underlying Jetpack Social data will no longer show share limits.
- **Edit post - publish bottom sheet**: This UI component uses `EditorJetpackSocialViewModel`, which in turn uses this UseCase to determine whether to show share limit information.
- **Edit post - settings**: Similar to the publish bottom sheet, this screen also uses `EditorJetpackSocialViewModel` and will now correctly hide share limits for Atomic sites.

#### 2. Added a new test file
I created a new test file `WordPress/src/test/java/org/wordpress/android/usecase/social/GetJetpackSocialShareLimitStatusUseCaseAtomicTest.kt` to verify that the UseCase now correctly returns `ShareLimit.Disabled` for Atomic sites, even if they have Jetpack installed and connected.

### Verification:
- The code changes were verified to be free of linter errors.
- The logic was compared against other parts of the codebase (e.g., `SiteListItemBuilder.kt`, `PagesViewModel.kt`) to ensure `isWPComAtomic` is the correct property for identifying Atomic sites.
- The UseCase was identified as the central logic for determining share limit visibility across the application.

15→ */
16→@Reusable

18→    private val contextProvider: ContextProvider,
19→    private val tagUpdateClientUtilsProvider: TagUpdateClientUtilsProvider
20→) {
21→    fun getResizedImageUrl(imageUrl: String?, width: Int, height: Int, isPrivate: Boolean, isAtomic: Boolean): String? =

25→        imageUrl: String?,
26→        width: Int,
27→        height: Int,

29→    ): String? = ReaderUtils.getResizedImageUrl(imageUrl, width, height, siteAccessibilityInfo)
30→
31→    fun getTagFromTagName(tagName: String, tagType: ReaderTagType): ReaderTag =
32→        ReaderUtils.getTagFromTagName(tagName, tagType)
33→
34→    fun getDefaultTagFromDbOrCreateInMemory() =
35→        ReaderUtils.getDefaultTagFromDbOrCreateInMemory(contextProvider.getContext(), tagUpdateClientUtilsProvider)
36→
37→    fun getLongLikeLabelText(numLikes: Int, isLikedByCurrentUser: Boolean): String =
38→        ReaderUtils.getLongLikeLabelText(contextProvider.getContext(), numLikes, isLikedByCurrentUser)
39→

41→

43→

45→

47→        return ReaderUtils.postAndCommentExists(blogId, postId, commentId)
48→    }
49→

  3→import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  4→import androidx.lifecycle.MediatorLiveData
  5→import androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  6→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  7→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  8→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
  9→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.map
 10→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 12→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.dashboard.CardModel.Type
 13→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.dashboard.CardsStore
 14→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteSource.MySiteRefreshSource
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteUiState.PartialState.CardsUpdate
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.SelectedSiteRepository
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.activity.DashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
 20→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig
 21→import javax.inject.Inject
 22→import javax.inject.Named
 23→
 24→const val REFRESH_DELAY = 500L
 25→
 26→class CardsSource @Inject constructor(
 27→    private val selectedSiteRepository: SelectedSiteRepository,
 28→    private val cardsStore: CardsStore,
 29→    private val dashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils: DashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils,
 30→    @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 31→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 32→    private val dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig: DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig,
 33→) : MySiteRefreshSource<CardsUpdate> {
 34→    override val refresh = MutableLiveData(false)
 35→
 36→    override fun build(coroutineScope: CoroutineScope, siteLocalId: Int): LiveData<CardsUpdate> {
 37→        val result = MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>()
 38→        result.getData(coroutineScope, siteLocalId)
 39→        result.addSource(refresh) { result.refreshData(coroutineScope, siteLocalId, refresh.value) }
 40→        refresh()
 41→        return result
 42→    }
 43→
 44→    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.getData(
 45→        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 46→        siteLocalId: Int
 47→    ) {
 48→        val selectedSite = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()
 49→        if (selectedSite != null && selectedSite.id == siteLocalId) {
 50→            coroutineScope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 51→                cardsStore.getCards(selectedSite)
 52→                    .map { it.model }
 53→                    .map { cards -> cards?.filter { getCardTypes(selectedSite).contains(it.type) } }
 54→                    .collect { result ->
 55→                        postValue(CardsUpdate(result))
 56→                    }
 57→            }
 58→        } else {
 59→            postErrorState()
 60→        }
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.refreshData(
 64→        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 65→        siteLocalId: Int,
 66→        isRefresh: Boolean? = null
 67→    ) {
 68→        when (isRefresh) {
 69→            null, true -> refreshData(coroutineScope, siteLocalId)
 70→            else -> Unit // Do nothing
 71→        }
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.refreshData(
 75→        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 76→        siteLocalId: Int
 77→    ) {
 78→        val selectedSite = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()
 79→        if (selectedSite != null && selectedSite.id == siteLocalId) {
 80→            fetchCardsAndPostErrorIfAvailable(coroutineScope, selectedSite)
 81→        } else {
 82→            postErrorState()
 83→        }
 84→    }
 85→
 86→    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.fetchCardsAndPostErrorIfAvailable(
 87→        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 88→        selectedSite: SiteModel
 89→    ) {
 90→        coroutineScope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 91→            delay(REFRESH_DELAY)
 92→            val result = cardsStore.fetchCards(selectedSite, getCardTypes(selectedSite))
 93→            val model = result.model
 94→            val error = result.error
 95→            when {
 96→                error != null -> postErrorState()
 97→                model != null -> onRefreshedBackgroundThread()
 98→                else -> onRefreshedBackgroundThread()
 99→            }
100→        }
101→    }
102→
103→    private fun getCardTypes(selectedSite: SiteModel) = mutableListOf<Type>().apply {
104→        if (shouldRequestStatsCard(selectedSite)) add(Type.TODAYS_STATS)
105→        if (shouldRequestPagesCard(selectedSite)) add(Type.PAGES)
106→        if (dashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils.shouldRequestActivityCard(selectedSite)) add(Type.ACTIVITY)
107→        add(Type.POSTS)
108→        if (shouldRequestDynamicCards()) add(Type.DYNAMIC)
109→    }.toList()
110→
111→    private fun shouldRequestPagesCard(selectedSite: SiteModel): Boolean {
112→        return (selectedSite.hasCapabilityEditPages || selectedSite.isSelfHostedAdmin) &&
113→                !appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHidePagesDashboardCard(selectedSite.siteId)
114→    }
115→
116→    private fun shouldRequestStatsCard(selectedSite: SiteModel): Boolean {
117→        return !appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHideTodaysStatsDashboardCard(selectedSite.siteId)
118→    }
119→
120→    private fun shouldRequestDynamicCards(): Boolean {
121→        return dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
122→    }
123→
124→    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.postErrorState() {
125→        val lastStateCards = this.value?.cards
126→        val showErrorCard = lastStateCards.isNullOrEmpty()
127→        val showError = lastStateCards?.isNotEmpty() == true
128→        postState(
129→            CardsUpdate(
130→                cards = lastStateCards,
131→                showErrorCard = showErrorCard,
132→                showSnackbarError = showError,
133→                showStaleMessage = showError
134→            )
135→        )
136→    }
137→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dynamiccard
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.dashboard.CardModel.DynamicCardsModel.CardOrder
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.dashboard.CardModel.DynamicCardsModel.DynamicCardModel
 5→import org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.handlers.DeepLinkHandlers
 6→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItem.Card.Dynamic
 7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.DynamicCardsBuilderParams
 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.ListItemInteraction
 9→import org.wordpress.android.util.UrlUtilsWrapper
10→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig
11→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.FeatureFlagConfig
12→import javax.inject.Inject
13→
14→class DynamicCardsBuilder @Inject constructor(
15→    private val urlUtils: UrlUtilsWrapper,
16→    private val deepLinkHandlers: DeepLinkHandlers,
17→    private val dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig: DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig,
18→    private val featureFlagConfig: FeatureFlagConfig,
19→) {
20→    fun build(params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams, order: CardOrder): List<Dynamic>? {
21→        if (!dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig.isEnabled() || !shouldBuildCard(params, order)) {
22→            return null
23→        }
24→        return convertToDynamicCards(params, order)
25→    }
26→
27→    private fun shouldBuildCard(params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams, order: CardOrder): Boolean {
28→        return !(params.dynamicCards == null || params.dynamicCards.dynamicCards.none { it.order == order })
29→    }
30→
31→    private fun convertToDynamicCards(params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams, order: CardOrder): List<Dynamic> {
32→        val cards = params.dynamicCards?.dynamicCards?.filter { it.order == order && it.isEnabled() }.orEmpty()
33→        return cards.map { card ->
34→            Dynamic(
35→                id = card.id,
36→                rows = card.rows.map { row ->
37→                    Dynamic.Row(
38→                        iconUrl = row.icon,
39→                        title = row.title,
40→                        description = row.description,
41→                    )
42→                },
43→                title = card.title,
44→                image = card.featuredImage,
45→                action = getActionSource(params, card),
46→                onHideMenuItemClick = ListItemInteraction.create(card.id, params.onHideMenuItemClick),
47→            )
48→        }
49→    }
50→
51→    fun DynamicCardModel.isEnabled(): Boolean {
52→        // If there is no feature flag or there is no such remote feature flag, then the card is enabled
53→        if (remoteFeatureFlag.isNullOrEmpty() ||
54→            featureFlagConfig.getString(requireNotNull(remoteFeatureFlag)).isEmpty()
55→        ) return true
56→        return featureFlagConfig.isEnabled(requireNotNull(remoteFeatureFlag))
57→    }
58→
59→    private fun getActionSource(
60→        params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams,
61→        card: DynamicCardModel
62→    ): Dynamic.ActionSource? = when {
63→        isValidUrlOrDeeplink(card.url) && isValidActionTitle(card.action) -> Dynamic.ActionSource.CardOrButton(
64→            url = requireNotNull(card.url),
65→            title = requireNotNull(card.action),
66→            onCardClick = ListItemInteraction.create(
67→                data = DynamicCardsBuilderParams.ClickParams(id = card.id, actionUrl = requireNotNull(card.url)),
68→                action = params.onCardClick
69→            ),
70→            onButtonClick = ListItemInteraction.create(
71→                data = DynamicCardsBuilderParams.ClickParams(id = card.id, actionUrl = requireNotNull(card.url)),
72→                action = params.onCtaClick
73→            )
74→        )
75→        isValidUrlOrDeeplink(card.url) -> Dynamic.ActionSource.Card(
76→            url = requireNotNull(card.url),
77→            onCardClick = ListItemInteraction.create(
78→                data = DynamicCardsBuilderParams.ClickParams(id = card.id, actionUrl = requireNotNull(card.url)),
79→                action = params.onCardClick
80→            )
81→        )
82→        else -> null
83→    }
84→
85→    private fun isValidUrlOrDeeplink(url: String?): Boolean {
86→        return !url.isNullOrEmpty() && (urlUtils.isValidUrlAndHostNotNull(url)
87→                || deepLinkHandlers.isDeepLink(url))
88→    }
89→
90→    private fun isValidActionTitle(title: String?): Boolean {
91→        return !title.isNullOrEmpty()
92→    }
93→}

 40→class PrepublishingHomeViewModel @Inject constructor(
 41→    private val getPostTagsUseCase: GetPostTagsUseCase,
 42→    private val postSettingsUtils: PostSettingsUtils,
 43→    private val getButtonUiStateUseCase: GetButtonUiStateUseCase,
 44→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 45→    private val storyRepositoryWrapper: StoryRepositoryWrapper,
 46→    private val updateStoryPostTitleUseCase: UpdateStoryPostTitleUseCase,
 47→    private val getCategoriesUseCase: GetCategoriesUseCase,
 48→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 49→) : ScopedViewModel(bgDispatcher) {
 50→    private var isStarted = false
 51→    private var updateStoryTitleJob: Job? = null
 52→    private lateinit var editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
 53→
 54→    private val _storyTitleUiState = MutableLiveData<StoryTitleUiState>()
 55→    val storyTitleUiState: LiveData<StoryTitleUiState> = _storyTitleUiState
 56→
 57→    private val _onActionClicked = MutableLiveData<Event<ActionType>>()
 58→    val onActionClicked: LiveData<Event<ActionType>> = _onActionClicked
 59→
 60→    private val _onSubmitButtonClicked = MutableLiveData<Event<PublishPost>>()
 61→    val onSubmitButtonClicked: LiveData<Event<PublishPost>> = _onSubmitButtonClicked
 62→
 63→    private val _uiState = MutableLiveData<List<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>>()
 64→    private var _socialUiState: MutableLiveData<SocialUiState> = MutableLiveData(SocialUiState.Hidden)
 65→
 66→    val uiState: LiveData<List<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>> = merge(
 67→        _uiState,
 68→        _socialUiState
 69→    ) { list, socialUiState ->
 70→        list?.map { item ->
 71→            if (item is SocialUiState) {
 72→                socialUiState ?: SocialUiState.Hidden
 73→            } else {
 74→                item
 75→            }
 76→        }
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    fun start(editPostRepository: EditPostRepository, site: SiteModel, isStoryPost: Boolean) {
 80→        this.editPostRepository = editPostRepository
 81→        if (isStarted) return
 82→        isStarted = true
 83→
 84→        setupHomeUiState(editPostRepository, site, isStoryPost)
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun setupHomeUiState(
 88→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository,
 89→        site: SiteModel,
 90→        isStoryPost: Boolean
 91→    ) {
 92→        val prepublishingHomeUiStateList = mutableListOf<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>().apply {
 93→            if (isStoryPost) {
 94→                _storyTitleUiState.postValue(StoryTitleUiState(
 95→                    storyTitle = UiStringText(StringUtils.notNullStr(editPostRepository.title)),
 96→                    storyThumbnailUrl = storyRepositoryWrapper.getCurrentStoryThumbnailUrl()
 97→                ) { storyTitle ->
 98→                    onStoryTitleChanged(storyTitle)
 99→                })
100→            } else {
101→                add(
102→                    HeaderUiState(
103→                        UiStringText(site.name),
104→                        StringUtils.notNullStr(site.iconUrl)
105→                    )
106→                )
107→            }
108→
109→            if (editPostRepository.status != PostStatus.PRIVATE) {
110→                showPublicPost(editPostRepository)
111→            } else {
112→                showPrivatePost(editPostRepository)
113→            }
114→
115→            if (!editPostRepository.isPage) {
116→                showNotSetPost(editPostRepository, site)
117→            } else {
118→                UiStringRes(R.string.prepublishing_nudges_home_categories_not_set)
119→            }
120→
121→            val categoriesString = getCategoriesUseCase.getPostCategoriesString(
122→                editPostRepository,
123→                site
124→            )
125→
126→            if (!editPostRepository.isPage) {
127→                add(HomeUiState(
128→                    navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Categories,
129→                    actionResult = if (categoriesString.isNotEmpty()) {
130→                        UiStringText(categoriesString)
131→                    } else {
132→                        run { UiStringRes(R.string.prepublishing_nudges_home_categories_not_set) }
133→                    },
134→                    actionClickable = true,
135→                    onNavigationActionClicked = ::onActionClicked
136→                ))
137→            }
138→
139→            add(SocialUiState.Hidden)
140→
141→            add(getButtonUiStateUseCase.getUiState(editPostRepository, site) { publishPost ->
142→                launch(bgDispatcher) {
143→                    waitForStoryTitleJobAndSubmit(publishPost)
144→                }
145→            })
146→        }.toList()
147→
148→        _uiState.postValue(prepublishingHomeUiStateList)
149→    }
150→
151→    private fun MutableList<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>.showNotSetPost(
152→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository,
153→        site: SiteModel
154→    ) {
155→        add(
156→            HomeUiState(
157→                navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Tags,
158→                actionResult = getPostTagsUseCase.getTags(editPostRepository)
159→                    ?.let { UiStringText(it) }
160→                    ?: run { UiStringRes(R.string.prepublishing_nudges_home_tags_not_set) },
161→                actionClickable = true,
162→                onNavigationActionClicked = ::onActionClicked
163→            )
164→        )
165→
166→        val categoryString: String = getCategoriesUseCase.getPostCategoriesString(
167→            editPostRepository,
168→            site
169→        )
170→        if (categoryString.isNotEmpty()) {
171→            UiStringText(categoryString)
172→        }
173→    }

175→    private fun MutableList<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>.showPrivatePost(
176→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
177→    ) {
178→        add(
179→            HomeUiState(
180→                navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Publish,
181→                actionResult = editPostRepository.getEditablePost()
182→                    ?.let {
183→                        UiStringText(
184→                            postSettingsUtils.getPublishDateLabel(
185→                                it
186→                            )
187→                        )
188→                    },
189→                actionTypeColor = R.color.prepublishing_action_type_disabled_color,
190→                actionResultColor = R.color.prepublishing_action_result_disabled_color,
191→                actionClickable = false,
192→                onNavigationActionClicked = null
193→            )
194→        )
195→    }
196→
197→    private fun MutableList<PrepublishingHomeItemUiState>.showPublicPost(
198→        editPostRepository: EditPostRepository
199→    ) {
200→        add(
201→            HomeUiState(
202→                navigationAction = PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Publish,
203→                actionResult = editPostRepository.getEditablePost()
204→                    ?.let {
205→                        UiStringText(
206→                            postSettingsUtils.getPublishDateLabel(
207→                                it
208→                            )
209→                        )
210→                    },
211→                actionClickable = true,
212→                onNavigationActionClicked = ::onActionClicked
213→            )
214→        )
215→    }
216→
217→    private fun onStoryTitleChanged(storyTitle: String) {
218→        updateStoryTitleJob?.cancel()
219→        updateStoryTitleJob = launch(bgDispatcher) {
220→            // there's a delay here since every single character change event triggers onStoryTitleChanged
221→            // and without a delay we would have multiple save operations being triggered unnecessarily.
222→            delay(THROTTLE_DELAY)
223→            storyRepositoryWrapper.setCurrentStoryTitle(storyTitle)
224→            updateStoryPostTitleUseCase.updateStoryTitle(storyTitle, editPostRepository)
225→        }
226→    }
227→
228→    private suspend fun waitForStoryTitleJobAndSubmit(publishPost: PublishPost) {
229→        updateStoryTitleJob?.join()
230→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.trackPrepublishingNudges(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.EDITOR_POST_PUBLISH_NOW_TAPPED)
231→        _onSubmitButtonClicked.postValue(Event(publishPost))
232→    }
233→
234→    override fun onCleared() {
235→        super.onCleared()
236→        updateStoryTitleJob?.cancel()
237→    }
238→
239→    private fun onActionClicked(actionType: ActionType) {
240→        _onActionClicked.postValue(Event(actionType))
241→    }
242→
243→    fun updateJetpackSocialState(
244→        state: EditorJetpackSocialViewModel.JetpackSocialUiState?
245→    ) {
246→        val isPostPublished = editPostRepository.getPost()?.status == PostStatus.PUBLISHED.toString()
247→        val newState = state?.takeUnless { isPostPublished }?.let {
248→            SocialUiState.Visible(
249→                it,
250→                onItemClicked = { onActionClicked(PrepublishingScreenNavigation.Social) }
251→            )
252→        } ?: SocialUiState.Hidden
253→
254→        _socialUiState.postValue(newState)
255→    }
256→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.social
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.R
 4→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.TrainOfIconsModel
 5→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.social.compose.PostSocialSharingModel
 6→import org.wordpress.android.ui.publicize.PublicizeServiceIcon
 7→import org.wordpress.android.usecase.social.ShareLimit
 8→import org.wordpress.android.util.StringProvider
 9→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.hasOneElement
10→import javax.inject.Inject
11→
12→class PostSocialSharingModelMapper @Inject constructor(
13→    private val stringProvider: StringProvider,
14→) {
15→    fun map(
16→        connections: List<PostSocialConnection>,
17→        shareLimit: ShareLimit,
18→    ): PostSocialSharingModel {
19→        val title = mapTitle(connections)
20→        val description = if (shareLimit is ShareLimit.Enabled) mapDescription(shareLimit) else ""
21→        val iconModels = mapIconModels(connections)
22→        val isLowOnShares = mapIsLowOnShares(shareLimit, connections)
23→        return PostSocialSharingModel(
24→            title = title,
25→            description = description,
26→            iconModels = iconModels,
27→            isLowOnShares = isLowOnShares,
28→        )
29→    }
30→
31→    private fun mapDescription(shareLimit: ShareLimit.Enabled): String {
32→        val sharesRemaining = shareLimit.sharesRemaining.coerceAtLeast(0)
33→        return if (sharesRemaining == 1) {
34→            stringProvider.getString(R.string.jetpack_social_social_shares_remaining_one)
35→        } else {
36→            stringProvider.getString(R.string.jetpack_social_social_shares_remaining, sharesRemaining)
37→        }
38→    }
39→
40→    private fun mapTitle(connections: List<PostSocialConnection>): String {
41→        val sharingEnabledConnections = connections.filter { it.isSharingEnabled }
42→        return when {
43→            // Sharing to 0 accounts
44→            sharingEnabledConnections.isEmpty() ->
45→                stringProvider.getString(R.string.jetpack_social_social_shares_title_not_sharing)
46→            // Sharing to 1 out of 1 account
47→            sharingEnabledConnections.hasOneElement() && connections.hasOneElement() ->
48→                stringProvider.getString(
49→                    R.string.jetpack_social_social_shares_title_single_account,
50→                    sharingEnabledConnections.single().externalName
51→                )
52→            // Sharing to all accounts
53→            sharingEnabledConnections.size == connections.size ->
54→                stringProvider.getString(
55→                    R.string.jetpack_social_social_shares_title_all_accounts,
56→                    connections.size
57→                )
58→            // Sharing to some accounts
59→            else -> stringProvider.getString(
60→                R.string.jetpack_social_social_shares_title_part_of_the_accounts,
61→                sharingEnabledConnections.size,
62→                connections.size
63→            )
64→        }
65→    }
66→
67→    private fun mapIconModels(connections: List<PostSocialConnection>) =
68→        connections.map { connection ->
69→            val iconResId = PublicizeServiceIcon.fromServiceId(connection.service)?.iconResId
70→            TrainOfIconsModel(
71→                data = iconResId,
72→                alpha = if (connection.isSharingEnabled) 1f else 0.3f
73→            )
74→        }.sortedBy { it.alpha }
75→
76→    private fun mapIsLowOnShares(
77→        shareLimit: ShareLimit,
78→        connections: List<PostSocialConnection>
79→    ): Boolean {
80→        if (shareLimit !is ShareLimit.Enabled) return false
81→
82→        val sharingEnabledConnections = connections.filter { it.isSharingEnabled }
83→        return when {
84→            // No more shares left.
85→            shareLimit.sharesRemaining <= 0 -> true
86→            // Sharing to some accounts, but not enough shares for all.
87→            connections.size > sharingEnabledConnections.size && shareLimit.sharesRemaining < connections.size -> true
88→            // Remaining shares < no. of accounts.
89→            shareLimit.sharesRemaining < connections.size -> true
90→            else -> false
91→        }
92→    }
93→}
