18→class CardsBuilder @Inject constructor(
19→    private val todaysStatsCardBuilder: TodaysStatsCardBuilder,
20→    private val postCardBuilder: PostCardBuilder,
21→    private val bloganuaryNudgeCardBuilder: BloganuaryNudgeCardBuilder,
22→    private val bloggingPromptCardBuilder: BloggingPromptCardBuilder,
23→    private val blazeCardBuilder: BlazeCardBuilder,
24→    private val plansCardBuilder: PlansCardBuilder,
25→    private val pagesCardBuilder: PagesCardBuilder,
26→    private val activityCardBuilder: ActivityCardBuilder,
27→    private val dynamicCardsBuilder: DynamicCardsBuilder,
28→) {
29→    fun build(
30→        dashboardCardsBuilderParams: DashboardCardsBuilderParams
31→    ) = mutableListOf<MySiteCardAndItem.Card>().apply {
32→        if (dashboardCardsBuilderParams.showErrorCard) {
33→            add(createErrorCard(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.onErrorRetryClick))
34→        } else {
35→            dynamicCardsBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.dynamicCardsBuilderParams, CardOrder.TOP)
36→                ?.let { addAll(it) }
37→
38→            bloganuaryNudgeCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.bloganuaryNudgeCardBuilderParams)
39→                ?.let { add(it) }
40→
41→            bloggingPromptCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.bloggingPromptCardBuilderParams)
42→                ?.let { add(it) }
43→
44→            if (dashboardCardsBuilderParams.blazeCardBuilderParams != null) {
45→                add(blazeCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.blazeCardBuilderParams))
46→            }
47→
48→            plansCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.dashboardCardPlansBuilderParams)?.let {
49→                add(it)
50→            }
51→
52→            todaysStatsCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.todaysStatsCardBuilderParams)
53→                ?.let { add(it) }
54→
55→            addAll(postCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.postCardBuilderParams))
56→
57→            pagesCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.pagesCardBuilderParams)?.let { add(it) }
58→
59→            activityCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.activityCardBuilderParams)?.let { add(it) }
60→
61→            dynamicCardsBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.dynamicCardsBuilderParams, CardOrder.BOTTOM)
62→                ?.let { addAll(it) }
63→        }
64→    }.toList()
65→
66→    private fun createErrorCard(onErrorRetryClick: () -> Unit) = MySiteCardAndItem.Card.ErrorCard(
67→        onRetryClick = ListItemInteraction.create(onErrorRetryClick)
68→    )
69→}

 248→    fun start(site: SiteModel) {
 249→        // Check if VM is not already initialized
 250→        if (_site == null) {
 251→            _site = site
 252→
 253→            loadPagesAsync()
 254→            uploadStarter.queueUploadFromSite(site)
 255→        }
 256→
 257→        pageListEventListener = pageListEventListenerFactory.createAndStartListening(
 258→            dispatcher = dispatcher,
 259→            bgDispatcher = defaultDispatcher,
 260→            postStore = postStore,
 261→            eventBusWrapper = eventBusWrapper,
 262→            siteStore = siteStore,
 263→            site = site,
 264→            invalidateUploadStatus = this::handleInvalidateUploadStatus,
 265→            handleRemoteAutoSave = this::handleRemoveAutoSaveEvent,
 266→            handlePostUploadFinished = this::postUploadedFinished,
 267→            handleHomepageSettingsChange = this::handleHomepageSettingsChange
 268→        )
 269→
 270→        val authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection = if (isFilteringByAuthorSupported) {
 271→            prefs.postListAuthorSelection
 272→        } else {
 273→            AuthorFilterSelection.EVERYONE
 274→        }
 275→
 276→        _authorSelectionUpdated.value = authorFilterSelection
 277→        _authorUIState.value = PagesAuthorFilterUIState(
 278→            isAuthorFilterVisible = isFilteringByAuthorSupported,
 279→            authorFilterSelection = authorFilterSelection,
 280→            authorFilterItems = getAuthorFilterItems(authorFilterSelection, accountStore.account?.avatarUrl)
 281→        )
 282→    }

 284→    override fun onCleared() {

 286→        if (::pageListEventListener.isInitialized) {

 288→        }
 289→    }

 291→    private fun loadPagesAsync() = launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 292→        refreshPages()
 293→
 294→        val loadState = if (pageMap.isEmpty()) FETCHING else REFRESHING
 295→        reloadPages(loadState)
 296→
 297→        isInitialized = true
 298→
 299→        scrollToPageId?.let {
 300→            onSpecificPageRequested(it)
 301→        }
 302→    }
 303→
 304→    private suspend fun reloadPages(state: PageListState = REFRESHING, forced: Boolean = false) {
 305→        if (performIfNetworkAvailableAsync {
 306→                _listState.setOnUi(state)
 307→
 308→                val result = pageStore.requestPagesFromServer(site, forced)
 309→                if (result.isError) {
 310→                    _listState.setOnUi(ERROR)
 311→                    showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.error_refresh_pages)))
 312→                    AppLog.e(PAGES, "An error occurred while fetching the Pages")
 313→                } else {
 314→                    _listState.setOnUi(DONE)
 315→                }
 316→                refreshPages()
 317→            }) else {
 318→            _listState.setOnUi(DONE)
 319→        }
 320→    }
 321→
 322→    private suspend fun refreshPages() {
 323→        pageMap = pageStore.getPagesFromDb(site).associateBy { it.remoteId }
 324→    }

 326→    fun onPageEditFinished(localPageId: Int, data: Intent) {
 327→        launch {
 328→            refreshPages() // show local changes immediately
 329→            withContext(defaultDispatcher) {
 330→                pageStore.getPageByLocalId(pageId = localPageId, site = site)?.let {
 331→                    _scrollToPage.postOnUi(it)
 332→                    _postUploadAction.postValue(Triple(it.post, it.site, data))
 333→                }
 334→            }
 335→        }
 336→    }

 357→    private fun trackTabChangeEvent(type: PageListType) {
 358→        val tab = when (type) {
 359→            PUBLISHED -> "published"
 360→            DRAFTS -> "drafts"
 361→            SCHEDULED -> "scheduled"
 362→            TRASHED -> "binned"
 363→        }
 364→        val properties = mutableMapOf("tab_name" to tab as Any)
 365→        AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(PAGES_TAB_PRESSED, site, properties)
 366→    }

 368→    fun checkIfNewPageButtonShouldBeVisible() {
 369→        _isNewPageButtonVisible.postOnUi(_isSearchExpanded.value != true)
 370→    }

 372→    fun onSearch(searchQuery: String, delay: Long = SEARCH_DELAY) {
 373→        searchJob?.cancel()
 374→        if (searchQuery.isNotEmpty()) {
 375→            searchJob = launch {
 376→                delay(delay)
 377→                searchJob = null
 378→                if (isActive) {
 379→                    _lastSearchQuery = searchQuery
 380→                    val result = groupedSearch(site, searchQuery)
 381→                    _searchPages.postValue(result)
 382→                }
 383→            }
 384→        } else {
 385→            clearSearch()
 386→        }
 387→    }

 389→    @SuppressLint("NullSafeMutableLiveData")
 390→    fun onSpecificPageRequested(remotePageId: Long) {
 391→        if (isInitialized) {
 392→            val page = pageMap[remotePageId]
 393→            if (page != null) {
 394→                _scrollToPage.postValue(page)
 395→            } else {
 396→                _showSnackbarMessage.postValue(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.pages_open_page_error)))
 397→            }
 398→        } else {
 399→            scrollToPageId = remotePageId
 400→        }
 401→    }
 402→
 403→    fun updatePreviewAndDialogState(newState: PostListRemotePreviewState, postInfo: PostInfoType) {
 404→        // We need only transitions, so...
 405→        if (_previewState.value == newState) return
 406→
 407→        // update the state
 408→        val prevState = _previewState.value
 409→        _previewState.postValue(newState)
 410→
 411→        // take care of exit actions on state transition
 412→        previewStateHelper.managePreviewStateTransitions(
 413→            newState,
 414→            prevState,
 415→            postInfo,
 416→            this::handleRemotePreview
 417→        )
 418→    }
 419→
 420→    private suspend fun groupedSearch(
 421→        site: SiteModel,
 422→        searchQuery: String
 423→    ): SortedMap<PageListType, List<PageModel>> = withContext(defaultDispatcher) {
 424→        val list = pageStore.search(site, searchQuery)
 425→            .groupBy { PageListType.fromPageStatus(it.status) }
 426→
 427→        return@withContext list.toSortedMap { previous, next ->
 428→            when {
 429→                previous == next -> 0
 430→                previous == PUBLISHED -> -1
 431→                next == PUBLISHED -> 1
 432→                previous == DRAFTS -> -1
 433→                next == DRAFTS -> 1
 434→                previous == SCHEDULED -> -1
 435→                next == SCHEDULED -> 1
 436→                else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Unexpected page type")
 437→            }
 438→        }
 439→    }
 440→
 441→    fun onSearchExpanded(restorePreviousSearch: Boolean) {
 442→        if (isSearchExpanded.value != true) {
 443→            AnalyticsUtils.trackWithSiteDetails(PAGES_SEARCH_ACCESSED, site)
 444→
 445→            if (!restorePreviousSearch) {
 446→                clearSearch()
 447→            }
 448→
 449→            _isSearchExpanded.value = true
 450→            _isNewPageButtonVisible.value = false
 451→        }
 452→    }
 453→
 454→    fun onSearchCollapsed() {
 455→        _isSearchExpanded.value = false
 456→        clearSearch()
 457→
 458→        launch {

 460→            checkIfNewPageButtonShouldBeVisible()
 461→        }
 462→    }

 464→    fun onMenuAction(action: PagesListAction, page: Page, context: Context? = null): Boolean {
 465→        when (action) {
 466→            VIEW_PAGE -> previewPage(page)
 467→            SET_PARENT -> setParent(page)
 468→            MOVE_TO_DRAFT -> changePageStatus(page.remoteId, PageStatus.DRAFT)
 469→            MOVE_TO_TRASH -> changePageStatus(page.remoteId, PageStatus.TRASHED)
 470→            PUBLISH_NOW -> publishPageNow(page.remoteId)
 471→            DELETE_PERMANENTLY -> deletePage(page)
 472→            CANCEL_AUTO_UPLOAD -> cancelPendingAutoUpload(LocalId(page.localId))
 473→            SET_AS_HOMEPAGE -> setHomepage(page.remoteId)
 474→            SET_AS_POSTS_PAGE -> setPostsPage(page.remoteId)
 475→            COPY -> onCopyPage(page)
 476→            SHARE -> context?.let { copyPageLink(page, it) }
 477→            PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE -> navigateToBlazeOverlay(page.remoteId)
 478→        }
 479→        return true
 480→    }

 509→    private fun setHomepage(homepageId: Long) {
 510→        performIfNetworkAvailable {
 511→            trackMenuSelectionEvent(SET_AS_HOMEPAGE)
 512→
 513→            if (site.showOnFront == PAGE.value) {
 514→                launch {
 515→                    val result = siteOptionsStore.updatePageOnFront(
 516→                        site,
 517→                        homepageId
 518→                    )
 519→                    val message = when (result.isError) {
 520→                        true -> {
 521→                            appLogWrapper.d(PAGES, "${result.error.type}: ${result.error.message}")
 522→                            R.string.page_homepage_update_failed
 523→                        }
 524→
 525→                        false -> {
 526→                            R.string.page_homepage_successfully_updated
 527→                        }
 528→                    }
 529→                    _showSnackbarMessage.postValue(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(message)))
 530→                }
 531→            } else {
 532→                _showSnackbarMessage.postValue(
 533→                    SnackbarMessageHolder(
 534→                        message = UiStringRes(R.string.page_cannot_set_homepage)
 535→                    )
 536→                )
 537→            }
 538→        }
 539→    }

 600→    private fun copyPage(pageId: Long, performChecks: Boolean = false) {

 603→                pageListDialogHelper.showCopyConflictDialog(it.post)
 604→                return

 606→
 607→            val post = postStore.instantiatePostModel(
 608→                site,
 609→                true,
 610→                it.title,
 611→                it.post.content,
 612→                PostStatus.DRAFT.toString(),
 613→                it.post.categoryIdList,
 614→                it.post.postFormat,
 615→                false
 616→            )
 617→
 618→            _editPage.postValue(Triple(site, post, false))
 619→        }

 654→            SET_PARENT -> "set_parent"
 655→            SET_AS_HOMEPAGE -> "set_homepage"
 656→            SET_AS_POSTS_PAGE -> "set_posts_page"
 657→            COPY -> "copy"
 658→            PUBLISH_NOW -> "publish_now"
 659→            MOVE_TO_DRAFT -> "move_to_draft"
 660→            DELETE_PERMANENTLY -> "delete_permanently"
 661→            MOVE_TO_TRASH -> "move_to_bin"
 662→            SHARE -> "share"
 663→            PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE -> "promote_with_blaze"

 846→    private fun changePageStatus(remoteId: Long, status: PageStatus) {
 847→        performIfNetworkAvailable {
 848→            if (status == PageStatus.DRAFT) {
 849→                trackMenuSelectionEvent(MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
 850→            } else if (status == PageStatus.TRASHED) {
 851→                trackMenuSelectionEvent(MOVE_TO_TRASH)
 852→            }
 853→
 854→            pageMap[remoteId]?.let { page ->
 855→                val oldStatus = page.status
 856→
 857→                val action = if (status != PageStatus.TRASHED || remoteId > 0) {
 858→                    PageAction(remoteId, UPLOAD) {
 859→                        val updatedPage = updatePageStatus(page, status)
 860→                        pageStore.updatePageInDb(updatedPage)
 861→                        refreshPages()
 862→                        _scrollToPage.postOnUi(updatedPage)
 863→                        pageStore.uploadPageToServer(updatedPage)
 864→                    }
 865→                } else {
 866→                    // Local pages are trashed locally
 867→                    PageAction(remoteId, UPDATE) {
 868→                        val updatedPage = updatePageStatus(page, status)
 869→                        pageStore.updatePageInDb(updatedPage)
 870→                        refreshPages()
 871→                        _scrollToPage.postOnUi(updatedPage)
 872→                    }
 873→                }
 874→
 875→                action.undo = {
 876→                    val updatedPage = updatePageStatus(page.copy(remoteId = action.remoteId), oldStatus)
 877→                    launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 878→                        pageStore.updatePageInDb(updatedPage)
 879→                        refreshPages()
 880→
 881→                        pageStore.uploadPageToServer(updatedPage)
 882→                    }
 883→                }
 884→
 885→                action.onSuccess = {
 886→                    launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 887→                        delay(ACTION_DELAY)
 888→
 889→                        val message = prepareStatusChangeSnackbar(status, action.undo)
 890→                        showSnackbar(message)
 891→                    }
 892→                }
 893→                action.onError = {
 894→                    launch(defaultDispatcher) {
 895→                        action.undo?.let { it() }
 896→
 897→                        showSnackbar(SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(R.string.page_status_change_error)))
 898→                    }
 899→                }
 900→
 901→                launch {
 902→                    _arePageActionsEnabled = false
 903→                    actionPerformer.performAction(action)
 904→                    _arePageActionsEnabled = true
 905→                }
 906→            }
 907→        }
 908→    }

 918→    private fun prepareStatusChangeSnackbar(newStatus: PageStatus, undo: (() -> Unit)? = null): SnackbarMessageHolder {

 921→            PageStatus.PUBLISHED -> R.string.page_moved_to_published
 922→            PageStatus.TRASHED -> R.string.page_moved_to_trash
 923→            PageStatus.SCHEDULED -> R.string.page_moved_to_scheduled
 924→            else -> throw NotImplementedError("Status change to ${newStatus.getTitle()} not supported")
 925→        }
 926→
 927→        return if (undo != null) {
 928→            SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(message), UiStringRes(R.string.undo), undo)
 929→        } else {
 930→            SnackbarMessageHolder(UiStringRes(message))
 931→        }

24→    fun getBuilderParams(dynamicCards: CardModel.DynamicCardsModel?): DynamicCardsBuilderParams {

218→    @Suppress("DEPRECATION", "OVERRIDE_DEPRECATION", "ReturnCount", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod")
219→    override fun onActivityResult(requestCode: Int, resultCode: Int, data: Intent?) {
220→        super.onActivityResult(requestCode, resultCode, data)
221→        if (data == null) {
222→            return
223→        }
224→        when (requestCode) {
225→            RequestCodes.DO_LOGIN -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
226→                viewModel.handleSuccessfulLoginResult()
227→            }
228→            RequestCodes.SITE_ICON_PICKER -> {
229→                if (resultCode != Activity.RESULT_OK) {
230→                    return
231→                }
232→                when {
233→                    data.hasExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_ID) -> {
234→                        val mediaId = data.getLongExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_ID, 0)
235→                        viewModel.handleSelectedSiteIcon(mediaId)
236→                    }
237→                    data.hasExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_URIS) -> {
238→                        val mediaUriStringsArray = data.getStringArrayExtra(
239→                            MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_URIS
240→                        ) ?: return
241→
242→                        val source =
243→                            org.wordpress.android.ui.photopicker.PhotoPickerActivity.PhotoPickerMediaSource.fromString(
244→                                data.getStringExtra(MediaPickerConstants.EXTRA_MEDIA_SOURCE)
245→                            )
246→                        val iconUrl = mediaUriStringsArray.getOrNull(0) ?: return
247→                        viewModel.handleTakenSiteIcon(iconUrl, source)
248→                    }
249→                    else -> {
250→                        AppLog.e(
251→                            AppLog.T.UTILS,
252→                            "Can't resolve picked or captured image"
253→                        )
254→                    }
255→                }
256→            }
257→            RequestCodes.STORIES_PHOTO_PICKER,
258→            RequestCodes.PHOTO_PICKER -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
259→                viewModel.handleStoriesPhotoPickerResult(data)
260→            }
261→            UCrop.REQUEST_CROP -> {
262→                if (resultCode == UCrop.RESULT_ERROR) {
263→                    AppLog.e(
264→                        AppLog.T.MAIN,
265→                        "Image cropping failed!",
266→                        UCrop.getError(data)
267→                    )
268→                }
269→                viewModel.handleCropResult(UCrop.getOutput(data), resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK)
270→            }
271→            RequestCodes.DOMAIN_REGISTRATION -> if (resultCode == Activity.RESULT_OK) {
272→                viewModel.handleSuccessfulDomainRegistrationResult(
273→                    data.getStringExtra(DomainRegistrationActivity.RESULT_REGISTERED_DOMAIN_EMAIL)
274→                )
275→            }
276→            RequestCodes.LOGIN_EPILOGUE,
277→            RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE -> {
278→                val isNewSite = requestCode == RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE ||
279→                        data.getBooleanExtra(LoginEpilogueActivity.KEY_SITE_CREATED_FROM_LOGIN_EPILOGUE, false)
280→                viewModel.performFirstStepAfterSiteCreation(
281→                    data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
282→                    isNewSite = isNewSite
283→                )
284→            }
285→            RequestCodes.SITE_PICKER -> {
286→                if (data.getIntExtra(WPMainActivity.ARG_CREATE_SITE, 0) == RequestCodes.CREATE_SITE) {
287→                    viewModel.performFirstStepAfterSiteCreation(
288→                        data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
289→                        isNewSite = true
290→                    )
291→                } else {
292→                    viewModel.onSitePicked()
293→                }
294→            }
295→            RequestCodes.EDIT_LANDING_PAGE -> {
296→                viewModel.checkAndStartQuickStart(
297→                    data.getBooleanExtra(SitePickerActivity.KEY_SITE_TITLE_TASK_COMPLETED, false),
298→                    isNewSite = data.getBooleanExtra(
299→                        EditPostActivity.EXTRA_IS_LANDING_EDITOR_OPENED_FOR_NEW_SITE, false
300→                    )
301→                )
302→            }
303→        }
304→    }

731→    private fun handleNavigation(action: BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction) {
732→        when (action) {
733→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.SharePrompt -> shareMessage(action.message)
734→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.AnswerPrompt -> {
735→                ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(
736→                    activity,
737→                    action.selectedSite,
738→                    false,
739→                    PagePostCreationSourcesDetail.POST_FROM_MY_SITE,
740→                    action.promptId,
741→                    PostUtils.EntryPoint.MY_SITE_CARD_ANSWER_PROMPT
742→                )
743→            }
744→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewAnswers -> {
745→                ReaderActivityLauncher.showReaderTagPreview(
746→                    activity,
747→                    action.readerTag,
748→                    ReaderTracker.SOURCE_BLOGGING_PROMPTS_VIEW_ANSWERS,
749→                    readerTracker,
750→                )
751→            }
752→            BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.LearnMore ->
753→                (activity as? BloggingPromptsOnboardingListener)?.onShowBloggingPromptsOnboarding()
754→            is BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.CardRemoved ->
755→                showBloggingPromptCardRemoveConfirmation(action.undoClick)
756→            BloggingPromptCardNavigationAction.ViewMore ->
757→                ActivityLauncher.showBloggingPromptsListActivity(activity)
758→        }
759→    }

815→    private fun startCropActivity(imageUri: UriWrapper) {
816→        val context = activity ?: return
817→        val options = UCrop.Options()
818→        options.setShowCropGrid(false)
819→        options.setStatusBarColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(android.R.attr.statusBarColor))
820→        options.setToolbarColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(R.attr.wpColorAppBar))
821→        options.setToolbarWidgetColor(context.getColorFromAttribute(com.google.android.material.R.attr.colorOnSurface))
822→        options.setAllowedGestures(UCropActivity.SCALE, UCropActivity.NONE, UCropActivity.NONE)
823→        options.setHideBottomControls(true)
824→        UCrop.of(imageUri.uri, Uri.fromFile(File(context.cacheDir, "cropped_for_site_icon.jpg")))
825→            .withAspectRatio(1f, 1f)
826→            .withOptions(options)
827→            .start(requireActivity(), this)
828→    }

 408→    private fun buildSiteItemsMenu(

 429→

 431→            infoItem?.let { add(infoItem) }
 432→            sotw2023Card?.let { add(it) }
 433→            addAll(siteItems)
 434→            jetpackSwitchMenu?.let { add(jetpackSwitchMenu) }
 435→            if (jetpackFeatureCardHelper.shouldShowFeatureCardAtTop())
 436→                jetpackFeatureCard?.let { add(0, jetpackFeatureCard) }
 437→            else jetpackFeatureCard?.let { add(jetpackFeatureCard) }

 506→                    cardsUpdate?.cards?.firstOrNull { it is DynamicCardsModel } as? DynamicCardsModel

 510→        )
 511→
 512→        val personalizeCard = personalizeCardBuilder.build(personalizeCardViewModelSlice.getBuilderParams())
 513→
 514→        val noCardsMessage = noCardsMessageViewModelSlice.buildNoCardsMessage(cardsResult)
 515→
 516→        return mutableListOf<MySiteCardAndItem>().apply {
 517→            infoItem?.let { add(infoItem) }

 519→            jetpackInstallFullPluginCard?.let { add(jetpackInstallFullPluginCard) }
 520→            quickLinks?.let { add(quickLinks) }
 521→            addAll(cardsResult)
 522→            noCardsMessage?.let { add(noCardsMessage) }
 523→            personalizeCard?.let { add(personalizeCard) }
 524→        }.toList()

 977→    private fun trackCardsAndItemsShownIfNeeded(siteSelected: SiteSelected) {
 978→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<DomainRegistrationCard>()
 979→            .forEach { domainRegistrationCardShownTracker.trackShown(it.type) }
 980→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<MySiteCardAndItem.Card>()
 981→            .let { cardsTracker.trackShown(it) }
 982→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<QuickStartCard>()
 983→            .firstOrNull()?.let { quickStartTracker.trackShown(it.type) }
 984→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<QuickStartCard>()
 985→            .firstOrNull()?.let { cardsTracker.trackQuickStartCardShown(quickStartRepository.quickStartType) }
 986→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<JetpackFeatureCard>()
 987→            .forEach { jetpackFeatureCardShownTracker.trackShown(it.type) }
 988→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<JetpackInstallFullPluginCard>()
 989→            .forEach { jetpackInstallFullPluginShownTracker.trackShown(it.type) }
 990→        dashboardCardPlansUtils.trackCardShown(viewModelScope, siteSelected)
 991→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<MySiteCardAndItem.Card.PersonalizeCardModel>()
 992→            .forEach { personalizeCardViewModelSlice.trackShown(it.type) }
 993→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<MySiteCardAndItem.Card.NoCardsMessage>()
 994→            .forEach { noCardsMessageViewModelSlice.trackShown(it.type) }
 995→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<MySiteCardAndItem.Card.WpSotw2023NudgeCardModel>()
 996→            .forEach { _ -> sotw2023NudgeCardViewModelSlice.trackShown() }
 997→        siteSelected.dashboardData.filterIsInstance<MySiteCardAndItem.Card.Dynamic>()
 998→            .forEach { dynamicCardsViewModelSlice.trackShown(it.id) }
 999→    }

1→package org.wordpress.android.usecase.social
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
 5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.FetchedJetpackSocialResult
 6→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.doesNotContain
 7→import javax.inject.Inject
 8→
 9→class GetJetpackSocialShareLimitStatusUseCase @Inject constructor(
10→    private val siteStore: SiteStore,
11→) {
12→    suspend fun execute(siteModel: SiteModel): ShareLimit {
13→        val isShareLimitEnabled =
14→            !siteModel.isHostedAtWPCom
15→                    && (siteModel.planActiveFeatures?.split(",")?.doesNotContain(FEATURE_SOCIAL_SHARES_1000) != false)
16→        val result = siteStore.fetchJetpackSocial(siteModel)
17→        return if (isShareLimitEnabled && result is FetchedJetpackSocialResult.Success) {
18→            with(result.jetpackSocial) {
19→                ShareLimit.Enabled(
20→                    shareLimit = shareLimit,
21→                    publicizedCount = publicizedCount,
22→                    sharedPostsCount = sharedPostsCount,
23→                    sharesRemaining = sharesRemaining,
24→                )
25→            }
26→        } else {
27→            ShareLimit.Disabled
28→        }
29→    }
30→}
31→
32→sealed interface ShareLimit {
33→    data class Enabled(
34→        val shareLimit: Int,
35→        val publicizedCount: Int,
36→        val sharedPostsCount: Int,
37→        val sharesRemaining: Int,
38→    ) : ShareLimit
39→
40→    object Disabled : ShareLimit
41→}
42→
43→private const val FEATURE_SOCIAL_SHARES_1000 = "social-shares-1000"
44→

14→class TodaysStatsViewModelSlice @Inject constructor(

17→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper,
18→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper
19→) {
20→    private val _onNavigation = MutableLiveData<Event<SiteNavigationAction>>()
21→    val onNavigation = _onNavigation
22→
23→    private val _refresh = MutableLiveData<Event<Boolean>>()
24→    val refresh = _refresh
25→
26→    fun getTodaysStatsBuilderParams(todaysStatsCardModel: TodaysStatsCardModel?): TodaysStatsCardBuilderParams {
27→        return TodaysStatsCardBuilderParams(
28→            todaysStatsCard = todaysStatsCardModel,
29→            onTodaysStatsCardClick = this::onTodaysStatsCardClick,
30→            onGetMoreViewsClick = this::onGetMoreViewsClick,
31→            moreMenuClickParams = TodaysStatsCardBuilderParams.MoreMenuParams(
32→                onMoreMenuClick = this::onMoreMenuClick,
33→                onHideThisMenuItemClick = this::onHideThisMenuItemClick,
34→                onViewStatsMenuItemClick = this::onViewStatsMenuItemClick
35→            )
36→        )
37→    }
38→
39→    private fun onTodaysStatsCardClick() {
40→        cardsTracker.trackCardItemClicked(CardsTracker.Type.STATS.label, CardsTracker.StatsSubtype.TODAYS_STATS.label)
41→        navigateToTodaysStats()
42→    }
43→
44→    private fun onGetMoreViewsClick() {
45→        cardsTracker.trackCardItemClicked(
46→            CardsTracker.Type.STATS.label,
47→            CardsTracker.StatsSubtype.TODAYS_STATS_NUDGE.label
48→        )
49→        if (jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowStaticPage()) {
50→            _onNavigation.value = Event(SiteNavigationAction.ShowJetpackRemovalStaticPostersView)
51→        } else {
52→            _onNavigation.value = Event(
53→                SiteNavigationAction.OpenExternalUrl(
54→                    TodaysStatsCardBuilder.URL_GET_MORE_VIEWS_AND_TRAFFIC
55→                )
56→            )
57→        }
58→    }
59→
60→    private fun onMoreMenuClick() {
61→        cardsTracker.trackCardMoreMenuClicked(CardsTracker.Type.STATS.label)
62→    }
63→
64→    private fun onHideThisMenuItemClick() {
65→        cardsTracker.trackCardMoreMenuItemClicked(
66→            CardsTracker.Type.STATS.label,
67→            TodaysStatsMenuItemType.HIDE_THIS.label
68→        )
69→        appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHideTodaysStatsDashboardCard(selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()!!.siteId, true)
70→        _refresh.postValue(Event(true))
71→    }
72→
73→    private fun onViewStatsMenuItemClick() {
74→        cardsTracker.trackCardMoreMenuItemClicked(
75→            CardsTracker.Type.STATS.label,
76→            TodaysStatsMenuItemType.VIEW_STATS.label
77→        )
78→        navigateToTodaysStats()
79→    }
80→
81→    private fun navigateToTodaysStats() {
82→        val selectedSite = requireNotNull(selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite())
83→        if (jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowStaticPage()) {
84→            _onNavigation.value = Event(SiteNavigationAction.ShowJetpackRemovalStaticPostersView)
85→        } else {
86→            _onNavigation.value = Event(SiteNavigationAction.OpenStatsInsights(selectedSite))
87→        }
88→    }
89→}
90→

93→    HIDE_THIS("hide_this")

1→package org.wordpress.android.util.extensions
 2→
 3→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.persistence.JetpackCPConnectedSiteModel
 5→
 6→/**
 7→ * @return a List of the active individual Jetpack plugins names
 8→ * (e.g. [Jetpack Search, Jetpack VaultPress Backup]) or null if there are no active Jetpack connection plugins.
 9→ */
10→fun SiteModel.activeIndividualJetpackPluginNames(): List<String>? =
11→    activeJetpackConnectionPluginValues()?.filterMapJetpackIndividualPluginValuesToNames()
12→
13→/**
14→ * @return a List of the active individual Jetpack plugins names
15→ * (e.g. [Jetpack Search, Jetpack VaultPress Backup]) or null if there are no active Jetpack connection plugins.
16→ */
17→fun JetpackCPConnectedSiteModel.activeIndividualJetpackPluginNames(): List<String> =
18→    activeJetpackConnectionPlugins.filterMapJetpackIndividualPluginValuesToNames()
19→
20→/**
21→ * @return true if the site has active Jetpack individual plugins connected and does not have the full Jetpack plugin
22→ */
23→fun SiteModel.isJetpackIndividualPluginConnectedWithoutFullPlugin(): Boolean =
24→    activeJetpackConnectionPluginValues()?.run {
25→        isNotEmpty() && none { it.isJetpackFullPlugin() } && any { it.isJetpackIndividualPlugin() }
26→    } ?: false
27→
28→/**
29→ * @return true if the site has active Jetpack individual plugins connected and does not have the full Jetpack plugin
30→ */
31→fun JetpackCPConnectedSiteModel.isJetpackIndividualPluginConnectedWithoutFullPlugin(): Boolean =
32→    activeJetpackConnectionPlugins.run {
33→        isNotEmpty() && none { it.isJetpackFullPlugin() } && any { it.isJetpackIndividualPlugin() }
34→    }
35→
36→private fun List<String>.filterMapJetpackIndividualPluginValuesToNames(): List<String> = this
37→    .filter { it.isJetpackIndividualPlugin() }
38→    .mapNotNull {
39→        when (it) {
40→            "jetpack-search" -> "Jetpack Search"
41→            "jetpack-backup" -> "Jetpack VaultPress Backup"
42→            "jetpack-protect" -> "Jetpack Protect"
43→            "jetpack-videopress" -> "Jetpack VideoPress"
44→            "jetpack-social" -> "Jetpack Social"
45→            "jetpack-boost" -> "Jetpack Boost"
46→            else -> null
47→        }
48→    }
49→
50→private fun String.isJetpackIndividualPlugin(): Boolean = this.startsWith("jetpack-")
51→
52→private fun String.isJetpackFullPlugin(): Boolean = this == "jetpack"

18→class EditPostPublishSettingsJetpackSocialUiStateMapper @Inject constructor(
19→    private val stringProvider: StringProvider,
20→    private val localeProvider: LocaleProvider,
21→    private val publicizeTableWrapper: PublicizeTableWrapper,
22→) {
23→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
24→    fun mapLoaded(
25→        connections: List<PostSocialConnection>,
26→        shareLimit: ShareLimit,
27→        socialSharingModel: PostSocialSharingModel,
28→        onSubscribeClick: (JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
29→        shareMessage: String,
30→        onShareMessageClick: () -> Unit,
31→        onConnectionClick: (PostSocialConnection, Boolean, JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
32→        isPostPublished: Boolean,
33→    ): Loaded {
34→        val selectedConnectionsSize = connections.filter { it.isSharingEnabled }.size
35→        return Loaded(
36→            jetpackSocialConnectionDataList = connections.map { connection ->
37→                JetpackSocialConnectionData(
38→                    postSocialConnection = connection,
39→                    onConnectionClick = { newValue, flow -> onConnectionClick(connection, newValue, flow) },
40→                    enabled = !isPostPublished && if (shareLimit is ShareLimit.Enabled) {
41→                        if (!connection.isSharingEnabled) {
42→                            shareLimit.sharesRemaining > selectedConnectionsSize
43→                        } else shareLimit.sharesRemaining > 0
44→                    } else true
45→                )
46→            },
47→            socialSharingModel = socialSharingModel,
48→            showShareLimitUi = !isPostPublished && shareLimit is ShareLimit.Enabled,
49→            isShareMessageEnabled = !isPostPublished,
50→            shareMessage = shareMessage,
51→            onShareMessageClick = onShareMessageClick,
52→            subscribeButtonLabel = stringProvider.getString(R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_subscribe_share_more)
53→                .uppercase(localeProvider.getAppLocale()),
54→            onSubscribeClick = onSubscribeClick,
55→        )
56→    }
57→
58→    fun mapNoConnections(
59→        onConnectProfilesClick: (JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
60→        onNotNowClick: (JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
61→    ): NoConnections =
62→        NoConnections(
63→            trainOfIconsModels = publicizeTableWrapper.getServiceList()
64→                .filter { it.status != PublicizeService.Status.UNSUPPORTED }
65→                .mapNotNull { PublicizeServiceIcon.fromServiceId(it.id) }
66→                .map { TrainOfIconsModel(it.iconResId) },
67→            message = stringProvider.getString(
68→                R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_connect_social_profiles_message
69→            ),
70→            connectProfilesButtonLabel = stringProvider.getString(
71→                R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_connect_social_profiles_button
72→            ),
73→            onConnectProfilesClick = onConnectProfilesClick,
74→            notNowButtonLabel = stringProvider.getString(
75→                R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_connect_not_now_button
76→            ),
77→            onNotNowClick = onNotNowClick,
78→        )
79→}

 37→sealed class PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(
 38→    internal val parent: ViewGroup,
 39→    @LayoutRes layout: Int
 40→) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(LayoutInflater.from(parent.context).inflate(layout, parent, false)) {
 41→    abstract fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState)
 42→
 43→    class PrepublishingHomeListItemViewHolder(parentView: ViewGroup, val uiHelpers: UiHelpers) :
 44→        PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(parentView, R.layout.prepublishing_action_list_item) {
 45→        private val actionType: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.action_type)
 46→        private val actionResult: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.action_result)
 47→        private val actionLayout: View = itemView.findViewById(R.id.action_layout)
 48→
 49→        override fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState) {
 50→            uiState as HomeUiState
 51→
 52→            actionType.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, uiState.navigationAction.textRes)
 53→            uiState.actionResult?.let { resultText ->
 54→                actionResult.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, resultText)
 55→            }
 56→
 57→            actionLayout.isEnabled = uiState.actionClickable
 58→            actionLayout.setOnClickListener {
 59→                uiState.onNavigationActionClicked?.invoke(uiState.navigationAction)
 60→            }
 61→
 62→            actionType.setTextColor(
 63→                ContextCompat.getColor(
 64→                    itemView.context,
 65→                    uiState.actionTypeColor
 66→                )
 67→            )
 68→            actionResult.setTextColor(
 69→                ContextCompat.getColor(
 70→                    itemView.context,
 71→                    uiState.actionResultColor
 72→                )
 73→            )
 74→        }
 75→    }

111→    class PrepublishingSocialItemViewHolder(
112→        parentView: ViewGroup,
113→        val uiHelpers: UiHelpers,
114→    ) : PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(parentView, R.layout.prepublishing_home_compose_item) {
115→        private val composeView: ComposeView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.prepublishing_compose_view)
116→        private val dividerView: View = itemView.findViewById(R.id.bottom_divider)
117→
118→        override fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState) {
119→            require(uiState is SocialUiState) {
120→                "PrepublishingSocialItemViewHolder can only bind SocialUiState"
121→            }
122→
123→            dividerView.isGone = uiState is SocialUiState.Visible &&
124→                    uiState.state is JetpackSocialUiState.NoConnections
125→
126→            composeView.setContent {
127→                val state: SocialUiState by remember(uiState) {
128→                    mutableStateOf(uiState)
129→                }
130→
131→                AppTheme {
132→                    (state as? SocialUiState.Visible)?.let { visibleState ->
133→                        when (val internalState = visibleState.state) {
134→                            is JetpackSocialUiState.Loaded -> {
135→                                PostSocialSharingItem(
136→                                    model = internalState.socialSharingModel,
137→                                    backgroundColor = MaterialTheme.colors.surface.withBottomSheetElevation(),
138→                                    modifier = Modifier
139→                                        .fillMaxWidth()
140→                                        .clickable(
141→                                            interactionSource = remember { MutableInteractionSource() },
142→                                            indication = null, // no ripple
143→                                            onClick = visibleState.onItemClicked,
144→                                        ),
145→                                )
146→                            }
147→
148→                            is JetpackSocialUiState.NoConnections -> {
149→                                PrepublishingHomeSocialNoConnectionsItem(
150→                                    connectionIconModels = internalState.trainOfIconsModels,
151→                                    onConnectClick = {
152→                                        internalState.onConnectProfilesClick(JetpackSocialFlow.PRE_PUBLISHING)
153→                                     },
154→                                    onDismissClick = { internalState.onNotNowClick(JetpackSocialFlow.PRE_PUBLISHING) },
155→                                    backgroundColor = MaterialTheme.colors.surface.withBottomSheetElevation(),
156→                                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
157→                                )
158→                            }
159→
160→                            JetpackSocialUiState.Loading -> {} // do nothing
161→                        }
162→                    }
163→                }
164→            }
165→        }
166→    }
167→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.plans
  2→
  3→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  4→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  5→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job

  9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 10→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItem.Card.DashboardPlansCard
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteViewModel.State.SiteSelected
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.BuildConfigWrapper
 15→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 16→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean
 17→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicReference
 18→import javax.inject.Inject
 19→import javax.inject.Named
 20→
 21→class PlansCardUtils @Inject constructor(
 22→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 23→    private val buildConfigWrapper: BuildConfigWrapper,
 24→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 25→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 26→) {
 27→    private var dashboardUpdateDebounceJob: Job? = null
 28→
 29→    private val plansCardVisible = AtomicReference<Boolean?>(null)
 30→    private val waitingToTrack = AtomicBoolean(false)
 31→    private val currentSite = AtomicReference<Int?>(null)
 32→
 33→    fun shouldShowCard(
 34→        siteModel: SiteModel,
 35→    ): Boolean {
 36→        return buildConfigWrapper.isJetpackApp &&
 37→                !isCardHiddenByUser(siteModel.siteId) &&
 38→                (siteModel.isWPCom || siteModel.isWPComAtomic) &&
 39→                siteModel.hasFreePlan &&
 40→                siteModel.isAdmin &&
 41→                !siteModel.isWpForTeamsSite
 42→    }
 43→
 44→    fun hideCard(siteId: Long) {
 45→        appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHideDashboardPlansCard(siteId, true)
 46→    }
 47→
 48→    fun trackCardShown(scope: CoroutineScope, siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 49→        // cancel any existing job (debouncing mechanism)
 50→        dashboardUpdateDebounceJob?.cancel()
 51→
 52→        dashboardUpdateDebounceJob = scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 53→            val isVisible = siteSelected
 54→                ?.dashboardData
 55→                ?.any { card ->
 56→                    card is DashboardPlansCard
 57→                } ?: false
 58→
 59→            // add a delay (debouncing mechanism)
 60→            delay(CARD_VISIBLE_DEBOUNCE)
 61→
 62→            plansCardVisible.set(isVisible)
 63→            if (isVisible && waitingToTrack.getAndSet(false)) {
 64→                trackCardShown(positionIndex(siteSelected))
 65→            }
 66→        }.also {
 67→            it.invokeOnCompletion { cause ->
 68→                // only set the job to null if it wasn't cancelled since cancellation is part of debouncing
 69→                if (cause == null) dashboardUpdateDebounceJob = null
 70→            }
 71→        }
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    fun onResume(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 75→        onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected)
 76→    }
 77→
 78→    fun onSiteChanged(siteId: Int?, siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 79→        if (currentSite.getAndSet(siteId) != siteId) {
 80→            plansCardVisible.set(null)
 81→            onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected)
 82→        }
 83→    }
 84→
 85→    fun trackCardTapped(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 86→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
 87→            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_TAPPED,
 88→            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
 89→        )
 90→    }
 91→
 92→    fun trackCardMoreMenuTapped(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 93→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
 94→            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_MORE_MENU_TAPPED,
 95→            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
 96→        )
 97→    }
 98→
 99→    fun trackCardHiddenByUser(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
100→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
101→            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_HIDDEN,
102→            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
103→        )
104→    }
105→
106→    private fun trackCardShown(positionIndex: Int) {
107→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
108→            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_SHOWN,
109→            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex)
110→        )
111→    }
112→
113→    private fun isCardHiddenByUser(siteId: Long): Boolean {
114→        return appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHideDashboardPlansCard(siteId)
115→    }
116→
117→    private fun positionIndex(siteSelected: SiteSelected?): Int {
118→        return siteSelected
119→            ?.dashboardData
120→            ?.indexOfFirst {
121→                it is DashboardPlansCard
122→            } ?: -1
123→    }
124→
125→    private fun onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
126→        plansCardVisible.get()?.let { isVisible ->
127→            if (isVisible) trackCardShown(positionIndex(siteSelected))
128→            waitingToTrack.set(false)
129→        } ?: run {
130→            waitingToTrack.set(true)
131→        }
132→    }
133→
134→    companion object {
135→        const val POSITION_INDEX = "position_index"
136→        private const val CARD_VISIBLE_DEBOUNCE = 500L
137→    }
138→}

13→        val isShareLimitEnabled =
14→            !siteModel.isHostedAtWPCom && !siteModel.isWPComAtomic
15→                    && (siteModel.planActiveFeatures?.split(",")?.doesNotContain(FEATURE_SOCIAL_SHARES_1000) != false)

21→                    publicizedCount = publicizedCount,
22→                    sharedPostsCount = sharedPostsCount,
23→                    sharesRemaining = sharesRemaining,

25→            }

27→            ShareLimit.Disabled
28→        }
29→    }
30→}
